Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************************

 The displayed category of isofibrations over setgroupoids

 In this file, we define the displayed category of isofibrations of setgroupoids. We also
 show that this displayed category is univalent and we equip it with a cleaving.

 This (univalent) displayed category is a key ingredient to represent the setgroupoid
 model of type theory. This model, which was used by Hofmann and Streicher to show that UIP
 is independent from MLTT, is represented by a comprehension category whose category of
 contexts is the (univalent) category of setgroupoids, and types in some setgroupoid [Γ] are
 the same as isofibrations into [Γ].

 Concretely, we represent an isofibration into a setgroupoid [Γ] by a displayed category [D]
 together with a cleaving on [D]. We assume that the type of objects over [x] forms a set
 and that every displayed morphism in [D] is invertible, so that the total category of [D]
 also is a setgroupoid.

 References
 - 'The groupoid interpretation of type theory' by Hofmann and Streicher

 Content
 1. Displayed categories that represent setgroupoids
 2. Properties of displayed setgroupoids
 3. The data of the displayed category of displayed setgroupoids
 4. Transport lemmas
 5. Verification of the axioms
 6. This displayed category is univalent
 6.1. Isos of displayed setgroupoids
 6.2. Proof of univalence
 7. The displayed category of isofibrations
 8. A cleaving for the displayed category of isofibrations
 9. The displayed category of split isofibrations

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.CategoryOfSetCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.CategoryOfSetGroupoids.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Sigma.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.PreservesCleaving.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.DisplayedCatEq.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Projection.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Reindexing.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. Displayed categories that represent setgroupoids *)
Definition is_disp_setgrpd
           {C : category}
           (D : disp_cat C)
  : UU
  := (∏ (x : C), isaset (D x))
     ×
     groupoidal_disp_cat D.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
isaprop (is_disp_setgrpd D)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
isaprop (is_disp_setgrpd D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isaprop (∏ x : C, isaset (D x))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isaprop (groupoidal_disp_cat D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isaprop (∏ x : C, isaset (D x))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
t: C
isofhlevel 1 ((λ t : C, isaset (D t)) t)

    apply isapropisaset.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isaprop (groupoidal_disp_cat D)
 apply isaprop_groupoidal_disp_cat.
Qed.

Definition disp_setgrpd
           (C : category)
  : UU
  := ∑ (D : disp_cat C), is_disp_setgrpd D.

Coercion disp_setgrpd_to_disp_cat
         {C : category}
         (D : disp_setgrpd C)
  : disp_cat C
  := pr1 D.


C: category
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
isaset (D x)


C: category
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
isaset (D x)

  exact (pr12 D x).
Qed.

Definition is_z_iso_disp_set_grpd
           {C : category}
           (D : disp_setgrpd C)
           {x y : C}
           {f : x --> y}
           (Hf : is_z_isomorphism f)
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
  : is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
  := pr22 D x y f Hf xx yy ff.

(** * 2. Properties of displayed setgroupoids *)

C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
p: x = x
xx: D x
pp: transportf D p xx = xx
pr1 (idtoiso_disp p pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso p) (id_disp xx)


C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
p: x = x
xx: D x
pp: transportf D p xx = xx
pr1 (idtoiso_disp p pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso p) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
p: x = x
xx: D x
pp: transportf D p xx = xx
idpath x = p
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
p: x = x
xx: D x
pp: transportf D p xx = xx
s: idpath x = p
pr1 (idtoiso_disp p pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso p) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
p: x = x
xx: D x
pp: transportf D p xx = xx
idpath x = p

    apply isaset_ob.
  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
p: x = x
xx: D x
pp: transportf D p xx = xx
s: idpath x = p
pr1 (idtoiso_disp p pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso p) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
pp: transportf D (idpath x) xx = xx
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
pp: xx = xx
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
pp: xx = xx
idpath xx = pp
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
pp: xx = xx
s: idpath xx = pp
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
pp: xx = xx
idpath xx = pp

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
pp: xx = xx
s: idpath xx = pp
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) pp) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (idpath xx)) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
id_disp xx =
transportb (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) (id_disp xx)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
transportb (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
  (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) (id_disp xx) =
id_disp xx

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x: C
xx: D x
isaset (pr1 C ⟦ x, x ⟧)

  apply (homset_property C).
Qed.


C: setcategory
x, y, z: C
p, p': x = y
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idtoiso p · f = idtoiso p' · f

x, y, z: C
p, p': x = y
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
idtoiso p · f = idtoiso p' · f

p = p'

s: p = p'
idtoiso p · f = idtoiso p' · f

C: setcategory

p, p': x = y
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
s: p = p'
idtoiso p' · f = idtoiso p' · f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y, z: C
p, p': x = y
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
pp: transportf D p xx = yy
pp': transportf D p' xx = yy
ff: yy -->[ f] zz
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_precomp_path p p' f)
  (idtoiso_disp p pp ;; ff)%mor_disp =
(idtoiso_disp p' pp' ;; ff)%mor_disp

  (idtoiso_disp p pp ;; ff)%mor_disp =
(idtoiso_disp p' pp' ;; ff)%mor_disp

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) pp ;; ff)%mor_disp =
(idtoiso_disp p' pp' ;; ff)%mor_disp

C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
transportf (λ z0 : pr1 C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_precomp_path (idpath x)
     (idpath x) f) (id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
transportf (λ z0 : pr1 C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_precomp_path (idpath x)
     (idpath x) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (id_left f) ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (id_left f) ff

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
transportf (λ z0 : pr1 C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_precomp_path (idpath x)
     (idpath x) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (! id_left f) ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (! id_left f) ff

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
transportf (λ z0 : pr1 C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (! id_left f @
   idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_precomp_path (idpath x)
     (idpath x) f) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (! id_left f) ff

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
! id_left f @
idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_precomp_path (idpath x)
  (idpath x) f = ! id_left f

  apply (homset_property C).
Qed.

p, p': y = z
f · idtoiso p = f · idtoiso p'

p, p': y = z

f · idtoiso p' = f · idtoiso p'

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p, p': y = z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pp: transportf D p yy = zz
pp': transportf D p' yy = zz
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f p p')
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp p pp)%mor_disp =
(ff ;; idtoiso_disp p' pp')%mor_disp


C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p, p': y = z

zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

pp': transportf D p' yy = zz

  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f p p')
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp p pp)%mor_disp =
(ff ;; idtoiso_disp p' pp')%mor_disp

p': y = y
xx: D x
yy, zz: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pp: transportf D (idpath y) yy = zz
pp': transportf D p' yy = zz
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y) p')
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) pp)%mor_disp =
(ff ;; idtoiso_disp p' pp')%mor_disp

C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p': y = y
xx: D x
yy, zz: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pp: transportf D (idpath y) yy = zz
pp': transportf D p' yy = zz
s: idpath y = p'
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y) p')
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) pp)%mor_disp =
(ff ;; idtoiso_disp p' pp')%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy, zz: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pp, pp': transportf D (idpath y) yy = zz
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y))
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) pp)%mor_disp =
(ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) pp')%mor_disp

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy, zz: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pp, pp': yy = zz
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y))
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) pp)%mor_disp =
(ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) pp')%mor_disp

  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y))
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (idpath yy))%mor_disp =
(ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) pp')%mor_disp

pp': yy = yy
s: idpath yy = pp'

     (idpath y))

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pp': yy = yy
s: idpath yy = pp'
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)

     (idpath y))
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (idpath yy))%mor_disp =

C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y))
  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (idpath yy))%mor_disp =

C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y)) (ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right f @
   idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
     (idpath y)) ff =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! id_right f @
idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_postcomp_path f (idpath y)
  (idpath y) = ! id_right f

  apply (homset_property C).
Qed.


C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
idtoiso p · f · idtoiso q =
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q'


C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
idtoiso p · f · idtoiso q =
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q'

  
C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
p = p'
C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
s: p = p'
idtoiso p · f · idtoiso q =
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q'

  
C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
p = p'

    apply isaset_ob.

w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
s: p = p'
idtoiso p · f · idtoiso q =
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q'

w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q =
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q'

w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
q = q'
C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
s: q = q'

C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
q = q'

    apply isaset_ob.
  
C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
s: q = q'
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q =
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q'

  
C: setcategory
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q' =
idtoiso p' · f · idtoiso q'

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
pp: transportf D p ww = xx
pp': transportf D p' ww = xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
qq: transportf D q yy = zz
qq': transportf D q' yy = zz
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, ww -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path p p' f q q')
  (idtoiso_disp p pp ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp q qq)%mor_disp =
(idtoiso_disp p' pp' ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp q' qq')%mor_disp


C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, x, y, z: C
p, p': w = x
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
pp: transportf D p ww = xx
pp': transportf D p' ww = xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
qq: transportf D q yy = zz
qq': transportf D q' yy = zz
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, ww -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path p p' f q q')
  (idtoiso_disp p pp ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp q qq)%mor_disp =
(idtoiso_disp p' pp' ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp q' qq')%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y, z: C
p': w = w
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q, q': y = z
ww, xx: D w
yy: D y
zz: D z
pp: transportf D (idpath w) ww = xx
pp': transportf D p' ww = xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
qq: transportf D q yy = zz
qq': transportf D q' yy = zz
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, ww -->[ z0] zz)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     p' f q q')
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath w) pp ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp q
                                         qq)%mor_disp =
(idtoiso_disp p' pp' ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp q' qq')%mor_disp

zz: D z

pp': transportf D p' ww = xx
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
qq: transportf D q yy = zz
qq': transportf D q' yy = zz
idpath w = p'

(id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) qq')%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
qq': yy = yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                         (idpath yy))%mor_disp =
(id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) qq')%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
qq': yy = yy
idpath yy = qq'
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
qq': yy = yy
s: idpath yy = qq'
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                         (idpath yy))%mor_disp =
(id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) qq')%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
qq': yy = yy
idpath yy = qq'

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
qq': yy = yy
s: idpath yy = qq'
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                         (idpath yy))%mor_disp =
(id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) qq')%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                         (idpath yy))%mor_disp =
(id_disp ww ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                       (idpath yy))%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
(id_disp ww ;; ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (transportb (mor_disp ww yy)
     (id_right (identity w · f))
     (id_disp ww ;; ff)%mor_disp) =
transportb (mor_disp ww yy)
  (id_right (identity w · f))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff)%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (transportf (mor_disp ww yy)
     (! id_right (identity w · f))
     (id_disp ww ;; ff)%mor_disp) =
transportf (mor_disp ww yy)
  (! id_right (identity w · f))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff)%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (identity w · f) @
   idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp ww yy)
  (! id_right (identity w · f))
  (id_disp ww ;; ff)%mor_disp

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (identity w · f) @
   idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (transportb (mor_disp ww yy) (id_left f) ff) =
transportf (mor_disp ww yy)
  (! id_right (identity w · f))
  (transportb (mor_disp ww yy) (id_left f) ff)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (identity w · f) @
   idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y))
  (transportf (mor_disp ww yy) (! id_left f) ff) =
transportf (mor_disp ww yy)
  (! id_right (identity w · f))
  (transportf (mor_disp ww yy) (! id_left f) ff)

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left f @
   ! id_right (identity w · f) @
   idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
     (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y)) ff =
transportf (mor_disp ww yy)
  (! id_left f @ ! id_right (identity w · f)) ff

  
C: setcategory
D: disp_setgrpd C
w, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D w
yy: D y
ff: ww -->[ f] yy
! id_left f @
! id_right (identity w · f) @
idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path (idpath w)
  (idpath w) f (idpath y) (idpath y) =
! id_left f @ ! id_right (identity w · f)

  apply (homset_property C).
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
isaset (cleaving D)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
isaset (cleaving D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y: C
isaset
  ((λ t : C,
    ∏ (c' : C) (f : C ⟦ c', t ⟧) (d : D t),
    cartesian_lift d f) y)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
isaset
  ((λ t : C,
    ∏ (f : C ⟦ t, y ⟧) (d : D y), cartesian_lift d f)
     x)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaset
  ((λ t : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, ∏ d : D y, cartesian_lift d t) f)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
isaset ((λ t : D y, cartesian_lift t f) yy)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
isaset (D x)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
∏ x0 : D x,
isaset
  ((λ x1 : D x, ∑ ff : x1 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
     x0)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
isaset (D x)
 apply H.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
∏ x0 : D x,
isaset
  ((λ x1 : D x, ∑ ff : x1 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
     x0)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
xx: D x
isaset
  ((λ x0 : D x, ∑ ff : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
     xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
xx: D x
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
xx: D x
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy, isaset (is_cartesian x0)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
xx: D x
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
 apply homsets_disp.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
xx: D x
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy, isaset (is_cartesian x0)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
xx: D x
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isaset (is_cartesian ff)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: ∏ x : C, isaset (D x)
y, x: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
xx: D x
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isaprop (is_cartesian ff)

      apply isaprop_is_cartesian.
Qed.

(** * 3. The data of the displayed category of displayed setgroupoids *)

disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setgroupoid


disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setgroupoid

  
cat_of_setgroupoid → UU
(λ obd : cat_of_setgroupoid → UU,
 ∏ x y : cat_of_setgroupoid,
 obd x → obd y → cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

  
cat_of_setgroupoid → UU
 exact (λ (G : setgroupoid), disp_setgrpd G).
  
(λ obd : cat_of_setgroupoid → UU,
 ∏ x y : cat_of_setgroupoid,
 obd x → obd y → cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ G : setgroupoid, disp_setgrpd G)
 exact (λ (G₁ G₂ : setgroupoid)
             (D₁ : disp_setgrpd G₁)
             (D₂ : disp_setgrpd G₂)
             (F : G₁ ⟶ G₂),
           disp_functor F D₁ D₂).
Defined.


disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setgroupoid
  disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd


disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setgroupoid
  disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd

  
∏ (x : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
(λ _ : ∏ (x : cat_of_setgroupoid)
       (xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd x),
       xx -->[ identity x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : cat_of_setgroupoid)
 (f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 (g : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd x)
 (yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd y)
 (zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  ?pr1

  
∏ (x : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 exact (λ (G : setgroupoid)
             (D : disp_setgrpd G),
           disp_functor_identity D).
  
(λ _ : ∏ (x : cat_of_setgroupoid)
       (xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd x),
       xx -->[ identity x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : cat_of_setgroupoid)
 (f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 (g : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd x)
 (yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd y)
 (zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  (λ (G : setgroupoid) (D : disp_setgrpd G),
   disp_functor_identity D)
 exact (λ (G₁ G₂ G₃ : setgroupoid)
             (F₁ : G₁ ⟶ G₂)
             (F₂ : G₂ ⟶ G₃)
             (D₁ : disp_setgrpd G₁)
             (D₂ : disp_setgrpd G₂)
             (D₃ : disp_setgrpd G₃)
             (FF₁ : disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂)
             (FF₂ : disp_functor F₂ D₂ D₃),
           disp_functor_composite FF₁ FF₂).
Defined.


disp_cat_data cat_of_setgroupoid


disp_cat_data cat_of_setgroupoid

  
disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setgroupoid
disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setgroupoid ?pr1

  
disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setgroupoid
 exact disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd.
  
disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setgroupoid
  disp_cat_ob_mor_of_disp_setgrpd
 exact disp_cat_id_comp_of_disp_setgrpd.
Defined.

(** * 4. Transport lemmas *)

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
disp_functor_data F (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₂)


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
disp_functor_data F (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₂)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
∏ x : G₁, pr1 D₁ x → pr1 D₂ (F x)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : G₁, pr1 D₁ x → pr1 D₂ (F x),
 ∏ (x y : G₁) (xx : pr1 D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
 (f : G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
∏ x : G₁, pr1 D₁ x → pr1 D₂ (F x)
 exact (λ x xx,
           transportb (pr1 D₂) (maponpaths (λ H, pr1 H x) p) (pr1 FF x xx)).
  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : G₁, pr1 D₁ x → pr1 D₂ (F x),
 ∏ (x y : G₁) (xx : pr1 D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
 (f : G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ # F f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : G₁) (xx : pr1 D₁ x),
   transportb (pr1 D₂)
     (maponpaths
        (λ H : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
               ∏ a b : G₁,
               G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 H x)
        p) (pr1 FF x xx))
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
∏ (x y : pr1 G₁) (xx : pr1 D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
(f : pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
→ transportb (pr1 D₂)
    (maponpaths
       (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
              ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
              pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
        pr1 H x) p) (pr1 FF x xx) -->[
  # F f] transportb (pr1 D₂)
           (maponpaths
              (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                     ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                     pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                     → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 H y) p)
           (pr1 FF y yy)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 H x) p) (pr1 FF x xx) -->[
# F f] transportb (pr1 D₂)
         (maponpaths
            (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 H y) p)
         (pr1 FF y yy)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data G₁ G₂
HF': is_functor FD'
p: pr1 (FD,, HF) = pr1 (FD',, HF')
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ FD',, HF'] D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 H x) p) (pr1 FF x xx) -->[
# (FD,, HF) f] transportb (pr1 D₂)
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                           ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                           pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                           → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
                     pr1 H y) p) (pr1 FF y yy)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF': is_functor FD'
p: FD = FD'
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD',, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 H x) p) (pr1 FF x xx) -->[
# FD f] transportb (pr1 D₂)
          (maponpaths
             (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                    ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                    pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                    → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 H y) p)
          (pr1 FF y yy)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 FF x xx -->[ # FD f] pr1 FF y yy

    exact (♯(pr1 FF) ff)%mor_disp.
Defined.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
            ∏ a b : G₁, G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z x) p) · # F' f
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
              ∏ a b : G₁,
              G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
       (! p)) = # F f


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
            ∏ a b : G₁, G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z x) p) · # F' f
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
              ∏ a b : G₁,
              G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
       (! p)) = # F f

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data G₁ G₂
HF': is_functor FD'
p: pr1 (FD,, HF) = pr1 (FD',, HF')
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
            ∏ a b : G₁, G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z x) p) · # (FD',, HF') f
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
              ∏ a b : G₁,
              G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
       (! p)) = # (FD,, HF) f

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF': is_functor FD'
p: FD = FD'
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z x) p) · # FD' f
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
              ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
              pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
        pr1 z y) (! p)) = # FD f

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f · identity (pr1 FD y) =
# FD f

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# FD f = # FD f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
y: G₁
yy: pr1 D₁ y
transportf (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
            ∏ a b : G₁, G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z y) (! p)) (pr1 FF y yy) =
transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF y yy


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
y: G₁
yy: pr1 D₁ y
transportf (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
            ∏ a b : G₁, G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z y) (! p)) (pr1 FF y yy) =
transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF y yy

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data G₁ G₂
HF': is_functor FD'
p: pr1 (FD,, HF) = pr1 (FD',, HF')
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ FD',, HF'] D₂
y: G₁
yy: pr1 D₁ y
transportf (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
            ∏ a b : G₁, G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z y) (! p)) (pr1 FF y yy) =
transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF y yy

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF': is_functor FD'
p: FD = FD'
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD',, HF') D₁ D₂
y: pr1 G₁
yy: pr1 D₁ y
transportf (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z y) (! p)) (pr1 FF y yy) =
transportb (pr1 D₂)
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 H y) p) (pr1 FF y yy)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
y: pr1 G₁
yy: pr1 D₁ y
pr1 FF y yy = pr1 FF y yy

  apply idpath.
Defined.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF))%mor_disp
  ff =
transportf
  (λ z : G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF x xx -->[
   z] transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF y yy)
  (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base p f)
  (idtoiso_disp
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
               ∏ a b : G₁,
               G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
        p)
     (transportfbinv D₂
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
                  ∏ a b : G₁,
                  G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
            pr1 z x) p) (pr1 FF x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF)
                                            ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
               ∏ a b : G₁,
               G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
        (! p))
     (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_path p
        FF yy))%mor_disp


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: pr1 F = pr1 F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF))%mor_disp
  ff =
transportf
  (λ z : G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF x xx -->[
   z] transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF y yy)
  (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base p f)
  (idtoiso_disp
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
               ∏ a b : G₁,
               G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
        p)
     (transportfbinv D₂
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
                  ∏ a b : G₁,
                  G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
            pr1 z x) p) (pr1 FF x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF)
                                            ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
               ∏ a b : G₁,
               G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
        (! p))
     (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_path p
        FF yy))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data G₁ G₂
HF': is_functor FD'
p: pr1 (FD,, HF) = pr1 (FD',, HF')
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ FD',, HF'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF))%mor_disp
  ff =
transportf
  (λ z : G₂ ⟦ (FD,, HF) x, (FD,, HF) y ⟧,
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF x xx -->[
   z] transportb_disp_functor_data_help p FF y yy)
  (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base p f)
  (idtoiso_disp
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
               ∏ a b : G₁,
               G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
        p)
     (transportfbinv D₂
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
                  ∏ a b : G₁,
                  G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
            pr1 z x) p) (pr1 FF x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF)
                                            ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
               ∏ a b : G₁,
               G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
        (! p))
     (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_path p
        FF yy))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF: is_functor FD
FD': functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF': is_functor FD'
p: FD = FD'
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD',, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
paths_rect (functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)) FD
  (λ (FD' : functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂))
   (p : FD = FD'),
   ∏ (HF' : is_functor FD')
   (FF : disp_functor (FD',, HF') D₁ D₂),
   transportb (pr1 D₂)
     (maponpaths
        (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
               ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
               pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
         pr1 H x) p) (pr1 FF x xx) -->[
   # FD f] transportb (pr1 D₂)
             (maponpaths
                (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                       ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                       pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                       → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 H y)
                p) (pr1 FF y yy))
  (λ (HF' : is_functor FD)
   (FF : disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂),
   (♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff) FD' p HF' FF =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   transportb (pr1 D₂)
     (maponpaths
        (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
               ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
               pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
         pr1 H x) p) (pr1 FF x xx) -->[
   z] transportb (pr1 D₂)
        (maponpaths
           (λ H : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                  ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                  pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                  → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 H y) p)
        (pr1 FF y yy))
  (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base p f)
  (idtoiso_disp
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
               ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
               pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
         pr1 z x) p)
     (transportfbinv D₂
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                  ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                  pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                  → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x) p)
        (pr1 FF x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                             (maponpaths
                                                (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 ∑
                                                 F : 
                                                 pr1
                                                 G₁
                                                 → 
                                                 pr1
                                                 G₂,
                                                 ∏
                                                 a
                                                 b : 
                                                 pr1
                                                 G₁,
                                                 pr1
                                                 G₁
                                                 ⟦ a,
                                                 b ⟧
                                                 → 
                                                 pr1
                                                 G₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F a,
                                                 F b ⟧,
                                                 pr1 z
                                                 y)
                                                (! p))
                                             (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_path
                                                p FF
                                                yy))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f)
  (id_disp (pr1 FF x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; id_disp
                                               (pr1 FF
                                                 y yy))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 FF x xx) (pr1 FF y yy))
     (id_right (identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f))
     (id_disp (pr1 FF x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff)%mor_disp)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 FF x xx) (pr1 FF y yy))
     (! id_right (identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f))
     (id_disp (pr1 FF x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff)%mor_disp)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (! id_right (identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f) @
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f)
  (id_disp (pr1 FF x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff)%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (! id_right (identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f) @
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 FF x xx) (pr1 FF y yy))
     (id_left (# FD f)) ((♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff))

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (! id_right (identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f) @
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 FF x xx) (pr1 FF y yy))
     (! id_left (# FD f)) ((♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff))

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (! id_left (# FD f) @
   ! id_right (identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f) @
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f) ((♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (! id_left (# FD f) @
   ! id_right (identity (pr1 FD x) · # FD f) @
   transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
     (idpath FD) f) ((♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff) =
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data (pr1 G₁) (pr1 G₂)
HF, HF': is_functor FD
D₁: disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: disp_functor (FD,, HF') D₁ D₂
x, y: pr1 G₁
f: pr1 G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isaset (pr1 G₂ ⟦ FD x, FD y ⟧)

  apply (homset_property G₂).
Qed.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
disp_functor_data F (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₂)


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
disp_functor_data F (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₂)

  exact (transportb_disp_functor_data_help (maponpaths pr1 p) FF).
Defined.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid

transportb_disp_functor_data p FF

F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (idpath F) FF) =
transportb_disp_functor_data (idpath F) FF

  apply idpath.
Qed.

D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
x: G₁
xx: pr1 D₁ x

  apply idpath.
Defined.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF)))%mor_disp
  ff =
transportf
  (λ z : G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) y yy)
  (id_right (identity (F x) · # F f) @ id_left (# F f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_help_ob p FF xx) ;; 
   ♯ (transportb_disp_functor_data p FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_help_ob
                                                 p FF
                                                 yy))%mor_disp


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F, F': G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'

D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF)))%mor_disp
  ff =
transportf
  (λ z : G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) y yy)
  (id_right (identity (F x) · # F f) @ id_left (# F f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_help_ob p FF xx) ;; 
   ♯ (transportb_disp_functor_data p FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_help_ob
                                                 p FF
                                                 yy))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (id_right (identity (F x) · # F f) @ id_left (# F f))
  (id_disp (pr1 FF x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; id_disp
                                               (pr1 FF
                                                 y yy))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂

x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 FF))%mor_disp ff =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   pr1 FF x xx -->[ z] pr1 FF y yy)
  (id_right (identity (F x) · # F f) @ id_left (# F f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 FF x xx) (pr1 FF y yy))
     (id_right (identity (F x) · # F f))
     (id_disp (pr1 FF x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff)%mor_disp)

yy: pr1 D₁ y

s: maponpaths pr1 p = idpath (pr1 (FD,, HF₁))
transportb_disp_functor_data_help
  (idpath (pr1 (FD,, HF₁))) FF = pr1 FF

  apply idpath.

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x: G₁
xx: pr1 D₁ x
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx =
pr1 FF x xx


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x: G₁
xx: pr1 D₁ x
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx =
pr1 FF x xx

  exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr1 z x xx) (transportb_disp_setgrpd p FF)).
Qed.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF)))%mor_disp
  ff =
transportf
  (λ z : G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) y yy)
  (id_right (identity (F x) · # F' f) @
   id_left (# F' f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) x))
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob p FF xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF)
                                               ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) y))
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob p FF yy))%mor_disp


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF)))%mor_disp
  ff =
transportf
  (λ z : G₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧,
   pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) y yy)
  (id_right (identity (F x) · # F' f) @
   id_left (# F' f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) x))
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob p FF xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 FF)
                                               ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) y))
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob p FF yy))%mor_disp

  (**
     We change the implicit arguments in this proof to make the goals more readable
   *)

   (idtoiso_disp ;; (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)) ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp =

F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp) ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp =
(idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (transportf
     (idtoiso_disp ;; transportf
                        (transportf
                           (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF)
                                               ff ;; 
                                             (idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp)))))%mor_disp) =
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (transportf
     (transportf
        (transportf
           (idtoiso_disp ;; (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1
                                                 FF)
                                                ff ;; 
                                              (idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp))))%mor_disp))) =
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp))%mor_disp

  (idtoiso_disp ;; (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;;

  (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp))%mor_disp

  (idtoiso_disp ;; (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;;

p: F = F'

yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =

  (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; 
                                     (idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp))))%mor_disp =
?b

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp = ?t2

    apply (idtoiso_disp_comp' (D := pr1 D₂)).
  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; 
                                     transportf
                                       idtoiso_disp)))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; (♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp))%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx)
        (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) y yy))
     (assoc (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
        (idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
                     ∏ a b : G₁,
                     G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
               pr1 z x) (maponpaths pr1 p)))
        (# F' f
         · (idtoiso
              (maponpaths
                 (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
                        ∏ a b : G₁,
                        G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
                  pr1 z y) (! maponpaths pr1 p))
            · idtoiso (idpath (F y)))))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp
           (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x
              xx)
           (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) y
              yy))
        (assoc
           (idtoiso (idpath (F x))
            · idtoiso
                (maponpaths
                   (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
                          ∏ a b : G₁,
                          G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                          → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
                   (maponpaths pr1 p))) (# F' f)
           (idtoiso
              (maponpaths
                 (λ z : ∑ F : G₁ → G₂,
                        ∏ a b : G₁,
                        G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
                  pr1 z y) (! maponpaths pr1 p))
            · idtoiso (idpath (F y))))
        (idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; 
         transportf idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp)) =
transportf
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) x xx)
        (pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) p FF) y yy))
     (assoc (idtoiso (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) x))) (# F' f)
        (idtoiso (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) y))))
     (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (transportf
     (transportf
        (idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; 
         transportf idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp)) =
transportf
  (transportf
     (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (transportf
     (transportf
        (transportf
           (idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF)
                                              ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp))) =
transportf
  (transportf
     (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp)

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp = ?y'

    apply (idtoiso_disp_comp' (D := pr1 D₂)).
  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid

p: F = F'

FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂

F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp =

  (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (transportf FF) x xx)
     (pr1 (transportf FF) y yy))
  (! assoc (idtoiso (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) x))) (# F' f)
       (idtoiso (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) y))) @
   assoc (idtoiso (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) x))) (# F' f)
     (idtoiso (idpath ((FD,, HF₁) y))))
  (transportf
     (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp) =
(idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid

F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'

D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x

p: F = F'

FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp =

F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (idtoiso_disp ;; ♯ (pr1 FF) ff ;; idtoiso_disp)%mor_disp

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
FD: functor_data G₁ G₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= FD,, HF₁: G₁ ⟶ G₂
F':= FD,, HF₂: G₁ ⟶ G₂
p: F = F'
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F'] D₂
x, y: G₁
f: G₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(cancel_postcomposition
   (pr1
      (idtoiso
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
            (maponpaths pr1 p))) · # FD f)
   (identity (FD x)
    · idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                  ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                  pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                  → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
           (maponpaths pr1 p)) · # FD f)
   (pr1
      (idtoiso
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
            (! maponpaths pr1 p) @ idpath (FD y))))
   (cancel_postcomposition
      (pr1
         (idtoiso
            (maponpaths
               (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                      ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                      pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                      → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
               (maponpaths pr1 p))))
      (identity (FD x)
       · idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                     ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                     pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                     → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
              (maponpaths pr1 p))) (# FD f)
      (pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath (FD x))
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
            (maponpaths pr1 p)))) @
 maponpaths
   (compose
      (identity (FD x)
       · idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                     ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                     pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                     → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
              (maponpaths pr1 p)) · # FD f))
   (pr1_idtoiso_concat
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
          pr1 z y) (! maponpaths pr1 p))
      (idpath (FD y))) @
 ! assoc
     (identity (FD x)
      · idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                    ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                    pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                    → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
             (maponpaths pr1 p))) (# FD f)
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                  ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                  pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                  → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
           (! maponpaths pr1 p)) · identity (FD y)) @
 ! assoc (identity (FD x))
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                  ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                  pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                  → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
           (maponpaths pr1 p)))
     (# FD f
      · (idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                     ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                     pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                     → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
              (! maponpaths pr1 p)) · identity (FD y))) @
 maponpaths (compose (identity (FD x)))
   (assoc
      (idtoiso
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
            (maponpaths pr1 p))) (# FD f)
      (idtoiso
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
            (! maponpaths pr1 p)) · identity (FD y))) @
 maponpaths (compose (identity (FD x)))
   (assoc
      (idtoiso
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
            (maponpaths pr1 p)) · # FD f)
      (idtoiso
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
            (! maponpaths pr1 p))) (identity (FD y))) @
 assoc (identity (FD x))
   (idtoiso
      (maponpaths
         (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
          pr1 z x) (maponpaths pr1 p)) · # FD f
    · idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                  ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                  pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                  → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
           (! maponpaths pr1 p))) (identity (FD y)) @
 cancel_postcomposition
   (identity (FD x)
    · (idtoiso
         (maponpaths
            (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                   ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                   pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                   → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z x)
            (maponpaths pr1 p)) · # FD f
       · idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
                     ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
                     pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧
                     → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧, pr1 z y)
              (! maponpaths pr1 p))))
   (identity (FD x) · # FD f) (identity (FD y))
   (maponpaths (compose (identity (FD x)))
      (transportb_disp_functor_data_help_on_mor_base
         (maponpaths pr1 p) f))) @
! (! assoc (identity (FD x)) (# FD f)
       (identity (FD y)) @
   assoc (identity (FD x)) (# FD f) (identity (FD y))) =
idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_prepostcomp_path
  (idpath (FD x) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z x) (maponpaths pr1 p)) (idpath (FD x))
  (# FD f)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑ F : pr1 G₁ → pr1 G₂,
            ∏ a b : pr1 G₁,
            pr1 G₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → pr1 G₂ ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
      pr1 z y) (! maponpaths pr1 p) @ idpath (FD y))
  (idpath (FD y))

  apply (homset_property G₂).
Qed.

Arguments transportf {X} P {x x'} e _.
Arguments idtoiso_disp {_ _ _ _} _ {_ _} _.

(** * 5. Verification of the axioms *)

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
isaset (D₁ -->[ F] D₂)


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
isaset (D₁ -->[ F] D₂)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
isaset (disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
∏ x : disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂,
isaset (disp_functor_axioms x)

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
isaset (disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
isaset (∏ x : G₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x))
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
∏ x : ∏ x : G₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x),
isaset
  ((λ x0 : ∏ x0 : G₁, D₁ x0 → D₂ (F x0),
    ∏ (x1 y : G₁) (xx : D₁ x1) (yy : D₁ y)
    (f : G₁ ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
    xx -->[ f] yy → x0 x1 xx -->[ # F f] x0 y yy) x)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
isaset (∏ x : G₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x))
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
t: G₁
t0: D₁ t
isaset ((λ _ : D₁ t, D₂ (F t)) t0)

      apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
∏ x : ∏ x : G₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x),
isaset
  ((λ x0 : ∏ x0 : G₁, D₁ x0 → D₂ (F x0),
    ∏ (x1 y : G₁) (xx : D₁ x1) (yy : D₁ y)
    (f : G₁ ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
    xx -->[ f] yy → x0 x1 xx -->[ # F f] x0 y yy) x)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
x: ∏ x : G₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x)
isaset
  ((λ x : ∏ x : G₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x),
    ∏ (x0 y : G₁) (xx : D₁ x0) (yy : D₁ y)
    (f : G₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
    xx -->[ f] yy → x x0 xx -->[ # F f] x y yy) x)

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
x: ∏ x : G₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x)
t, t0: G₁
t1: D₁ t
t2: D₁ t0
t3: G₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: t1 -->[ t3] t2
isaset
  ((λ _ : t1 -->[ t3] t2, x t t1 -->[ # F t3] x t0 t2)
     t4)

      apply homsets_disp.
  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
∏ x : disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂,
isaset (disp_functor_axioms x)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
x: disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂
isaset (disp_functor_axioms x)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
x: disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂
isaprop (disp_functor_axioms x)

    apply isaprop_disp_functor_axioms.
Qed.


disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setgroupoid
  disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd


disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setgroupoid
  disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd

  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
∏ (x y : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
∏ (x y z w : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y)
(zz : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd z)
(ww : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
∏ (x y : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
(id_disp D₁ ;; FF)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF

    
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 (id_disp D₁ ;; FF)%mor_disp =
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF)

    
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF) =
pr1 (id_disp D₁ ;; FF)%mor_disp

    
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF) = ?b
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
?b = pr1 (id_disp D₁ ;; FF)%mor_disp

    
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF) = ?b

      apply transportb_disp_setgrpd.
    
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 FF = pr1 (id_disp D₁ ;; FF)%mor_disp

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF) = ?b
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid

D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁

?b = pr1 (FF ;; id_disp D₂)%mor_disp

    
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
