D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF) = ?b

      apply transportb_disp_setgrpd.
    
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: pr1 disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
FF: D₁ -->[ F] D₂
pr1 FF = pr1 (FF ;; id_disp D₂)%mor_disp

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (x y z w : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y)
(zz : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd z)
(ww : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
 
G₁, G₂, G₃, G₄: cat_of_setgroupoid
F₁: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
F₂: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₃ ⟧
F₃: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₄ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
D₃: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₃
D₄: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₄
FF₁: D₁ -->[ F₁] D₂
FF₂: D₂ -->[ F₂] D₃
FF₃: D₃ -->[ F₃] D₄
(FF₁ ;; (FF₂ ;; FF₃))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F₁ F₂ F₃)
  (FF₁ ;; FF₂ ;; FF₃)%mor_disp

    
G₁, G₂, G₃, G₄: cat_of_setgroupoid
F₁: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
F₂: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₃ ⟧
F₃: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₄ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
D₃: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₃
D₄: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₄
FF₁: D₁ -->[ F₁] D₂
FF₂: D₂ -->[ F₂] D₃
FF₃: D₃ -->[ F₃] D₄
pr1 (FF₁ ;; (FF₂ ;; FF₃))%mor_disp =
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F₁ F₂ F₃)
     (FF₁ ;; FF₂ ;; FF₃)%mor_disp)

    
G₁, G₂, G₃, G₄: cat_of_setgroupoid
F₁: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
F₂: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₃ ⟧
F₃: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₄ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
D₃: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₃
D₄: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₄
FF₁: D₁ -->[ F₁] D₂
FF₂: D₂ -->[ F₂] D₃
FF₃: D₃ -->[ F₃] D₄
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F₁ F₂ F₃)
     (FF₁ ;; FF₂ ;; FF₃)%mor_disp) =
pr1 (FF₁ ;; (FF₂ ;; FF₃))%mor_disp

    
G₁, G₂, G₃, G₄: cat_of_setgroupoid
F₁: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
F₂: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₃ ⟧
F₃: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₄ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
D₃: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₃
D₄: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₄
FF₁: D₁ -->[ F₁] D₂
FF₂: D₂ -->[ F₂] D₃
FF₃: D₃ -->[ F₃] D₄
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F₁ F₂ F₃)
     (FF₁ ;; FF₂ ;; FF₃)%mor_disp) = ?b
G₁, G₂, G₃, G₄: cat_of_setgroupoid
F₁: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
F₂: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₃ ⟧
F₃: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₄ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
D₃: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₃
D₄: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₄
FF₁: D₁ -->[ F₁] D₂
FF₂: D₂ -->[ F₂] D₃
FF₃: D₃ -->[ F₃] D₄
?b = pr1 (FF₁ ;; (FF₂ ;; FF₃))%mor_disp

    
G₁, G₂, G₃, G₄: cat_of_setgroupoid
F₁: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
F₂: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₃ ⟧
F₃: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₄ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
D₃: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₃
D₄: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₄
FF₁: D₁ -->[ F₁] D₂
FF₂: D₂ -->[ F₂] D₃
FF₃: D₃ -->[ F₃] D₄
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F₁ F₂ F₃)
     (FF₁ ;; FF₂ ;; FF₃)%mor_disp) = ?b

      apply transportb_disp_setgrpd.
    
G₁, G₂, G₃, G₄: cat_of_setgroupoid
F₁: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
F₂: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₃ ⟧
F₃: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₄ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
D₃: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₃
D₄: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₄
FF₁: D₁ -->[ F₁] D₂
FF₂: D₂ -->[ F₂] D₃
FF₃: D₃ -->[ F₃] D₄
pr1 (FF₁ ;; FF₂ ;; FF₃)%mor_disp =
pr1 (FF₁ ;; (FF₂ ;; FF₃))%mor_disp

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setgroupoid)
(f : cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
 
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₁, G₂ ⟧
D₁: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₁
D₂: disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
isaset (D₁ -->[ F] D₂)

    apply isaset_disp_functor.
Qed.


disp_cat cat_of_setgroupoid


disp_cat cat_of_setgroupoid

  
disp_cat_data cat_of_setgroupoid
disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setgroupoid ?pr1

  
disp_cat_data cat_of_setgroupoid
 exact disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd.
  
disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setgroupoid
  disp_cat_data_of_disp_setgrpd
 exact disp_cat_axioms_of_disp_setgrpd.
Defined.

(** * 6. This displayed category is univalent *)

(** ** 6.1. Isos of displayed setgroupoids *)
Section Isos.
  Context {G : setgroupoid}
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_setgrpd G}
          (F : disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂).

  Section ToIso.
    Context (HF₁ : ∏ (x : G), isweq (F x))
            (HF₂ : disp_functor_ff F).

    Let Fo (x : G) : D₁ x ≃ D₂ x := make_weq _ (HF₁ x).

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_data (functor_identity (pr1 G)) D₂ D₁

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_data (functor_identity (pr1 G)) D₂ D₁

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ x : pr1 G, D₂ x → D₁ (functor_identity (pr1 G) x)
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(λ Fob : ∏ x : pr1 G,
         D₂ x → D₁ (functor_identity (pr1 G) x),
 ∏ (x y : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x) (yy : D₂ y)
 (f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   # (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ x : pr1 G, D₂ x → D₁ (functor_identity (pr1 G) x)
 exact (λ x xx, invmap (Fo x) xx).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(λ Fob : ∏ x : pr1 G,
         D₂ x → D₁ (functor_identity (pr1 G) x),
 ∏ (x y : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x) (yy : D₂ y)
 (f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   # (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x), invmap (Fo x) xx)
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (functor_identity G)
  (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f) =
idtoiso (idpath x) · f · idtoiso (idpath y)

        abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_axioms
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_axioms
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x),
(♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data)%mor_disp
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx)
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity (pr1 G)) x)
  (id_disp
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx))
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x y z : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x) (yy : pr1 D₂ y)
(zz : pr1 D₂ z) (f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
(♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data)%mor_disp
  (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx)
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f g)
  (♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data ff ;; 
   ♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data gg)%mor_disp

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x),
(♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data)%mor_disp
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx)
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_identity (pr1 G)) x)
  (id_disp
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx))
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportb
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
        x x (identity x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx))%mor_disp) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; id_disp xx ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx))%mor_disp) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) xx)
        (id_right (identity x))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                            (idpath x)
                                            (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo x)
                                                 xx))%mor_disp) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) xx)
        (! id_right (identity x))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                            (idpath x)
                                            (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo x)
                                                 xx))%mor_disp) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
           (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_right (identity x)))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                           (idpath x)
                                           (! homotweqinvweq
                                                (Fo x)
                                                xx))%mor_disp)) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath x)
                                        (! homotweqinvweq
                                             (Fo x) xx))%mor_disp) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath x)
                                        (! homotweqinvweq
                                             (Fo x) xx))%mor_disp) =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
?b = id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath x)
                                        (! homotweqinvweq
                                             (Fo x) xx))%mor_disp) =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (! homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx))%mor_disp =
?t2

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (transportb
        (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
         z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx @
            ! homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx)))) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (transportf
        (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
         z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx @
            ! homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx)))) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx @
         ! homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx))) =

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (idpath (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))))) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! id_left (identity x) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (id_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))) =
id_disp (invmap (Fo x) xx)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (! id_left (identity x) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! id_right (identity x)) @
      ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x x (identity x))
     (id_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))) =
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))
     (functor_id (functor_identity G) x)
     (id_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
  (! id_left (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! id_right (identity x)) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       x (identity x))
  (id_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))
  (functor_id (functor_identity G) x)
  (id_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z] F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
  (! id_left (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! id_right (identity x)) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       x (identity x))
  (id_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))
  (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)
  (id_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
! id_left (identity x) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
  (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
  (! id_right (identity x)) @
! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x x
    (identity x) = ! functor_id (functor_identity G) x

        apply (homset_property G).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x y z : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x) (yy : pr1 D₂ y)
(zz : pr1 D₂ z) (f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy)
(gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
(♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data)%mor_disp
  (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data x xx)
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f g)
  (♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data ff ;; 
   ♯ to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data gg)%mor_disp
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
        x z (f · g))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))%mor_disp) =
(disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
   (transportb
      (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
       F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
       z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
      (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
         x y f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 y)
                                               (! 
                                                homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))) ;; 
 disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
   (transportb
      (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧,
       F y (invmap (Fo y) yy) -->[
       z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
      (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
         y z g)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
         (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; gg ;; idtoiso_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 z)
                                               (! 
                                                homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
        x z (f · g))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; gg) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))%mor_disp) =
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
     (transportb
        (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
         z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
        (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
           x y f)
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
      transportb
        (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧,
         F y (invmap (Fo y) yy) -->[
         z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
        (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
           y z g)
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; gg ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x z
     (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; gg) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))%mor_disp =
transportb
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportb
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
        x y f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 y)
                                              (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
   transportb
     (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧,
      F y (invmap (Fo y) yy) -->[
      z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
     (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
        y z g)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; gg ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 z)
                                              (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; gg) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
      z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 y)
                                              (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧,
      F y (invmap (Fo y) yy) -->[
      z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; gg ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 z)
                                              (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; gg) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity x · f · identity y)
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (# (functor_identity G) g)
        (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
             x y f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 y)
                                              (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
      transportf
        (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧,
         F y (invmap (Fo y) yy) -->[
         z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
        (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
             y z g)
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; gg ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; gg) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity x · f · identity y)
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (# (functor_identity G) g)
        (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
             x y f))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
           (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
           (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
                y z g))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
         (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
            (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; gg ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; gg) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath y)
                                        (homotweqinvweq
                                           (Fo y) yy) ;; gg ;; 
                                      idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath z)
                                        (! homotweqinvweq
                                             (Fo z) zz)))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; transportf
                                        (mor_disp xx
                                           (F z
                                              (invmap
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))
                                        (assoc f g
                                           (identity z))
                                        (ff ;; (gg ;; 
                                                idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))%mor_disp) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
        (identity y · g · identity z))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
           (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
        (assoc (identity x) f
           (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                                 transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (F y
                                                 (invmap
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (F z
                                                 (invmap
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (identity
                                                 y) g
                                                 (identity
                                                 z))
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                                 (gg ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))))%mor_disp))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
           (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f g (identity z)))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; (gg ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))%mor_disp)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
        (identity y · g · identity z))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
           (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
        (assoc (identity x) f
           (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
              (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (maponpaths (compose f)
                 (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
                    (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; 
                                             (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                              (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                               (gg ;; 
                                                idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))))%mor_disp)))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
             (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                              (gg ;; 
                                               idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
             (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                              (gg ;; 
                                               idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
             (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                              (gg ;; 
                                               idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
             (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                              (gg ;; 
                                               idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; 
 (idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; 
  (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
           (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb (mor_disp yy (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (assoc (identity y) (identity y) (g · identity z))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath y)
                                       (homotweqinvweq
                                          (Fo y) yy) ;; 
   (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
            (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz)))%mor_disp =
?t2

zz: pr1 D₂ z

g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; 
 (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
          (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz)))%mor_disp =
?t2

?y'

HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b = ?y'

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy))%mor_disp =
?b

            apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy @
      homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy)) = ?y'

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂

HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ y, y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left (identity y)) (id_disp yy) = ?y'

          apply idpath.
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)

x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @

     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; transportb
            (mor_disp yy (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
            (assoc (identity y) (identity y)
               (g · identity z))
            (transportb
               (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ y, y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
               (id_left (identity y)) (id_disp yy) ;; 
             (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                      (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz)))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂

HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; transportf
            (mor_disp yy (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
            (! assoc (identity y) (identity y)
                 (g · identity z))
            (transportf
               (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ y, y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
               (! id_left (identity y)) (id_disp yy) ;; 
             (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)

transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; transportf
            (mor_disp yy (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
            (! assoc (identity y) (identity y)
                 (g · identity z))
            (transportf
               (mor_disp yy (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
               (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
                  (identity y · identity y)
                  (g · identity z)
                  (! id_left (identity y)))
               (id_disp yy ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath z)
                                       (! homotweqinvweq
                                            (Fo z) zz))))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose f)
           (! assoc (identity y) (identity y)
                (g · identity z))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
           (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
                 (identity y · identity y)
                 (g · identity z)
                 (! id_left (identity y)))))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; (id_disp
                                                 yy ;; 
                                                 (gg ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz)))))%mor_disp)) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp

          y z g) @

     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;;

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;;

  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))

     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)

     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! assoc (identity y) (identity y)

     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @

     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @

     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;;

HF₂: disp_functor_ff F

x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
           (identity y · identity y) (g · identity z)
           (! id_left (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! assoc (identity y) (identity y)
             (g · identity z))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
        (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose f)
           (! id_left (g · identity z))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; (gg ;; 
                                              idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 z)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo z)
                                                 zz))))%mor_disp) =
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))

     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx))
     (F z (invmap (Fo z) zz)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! id_left (g · identity z))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
           (identity y · identity y) (g · identity z)
           (! id_left (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! assoc (identity y) (identity y)
             (g · identity z))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
           (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f
     (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity y · g · identity z) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          y z g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) g)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
   z0] F z (invmap (Fo z) zz))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc f g (identity z)) @
   assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
   ! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       z (f · g))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (gg ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath z)
                   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo z) zz))))%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y, z: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
yy: pr1 D₂ y
zz: pr1 D₂ z
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: pr1 G ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (maponpaths (compose f) (! id_left (g · identity z))) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (identity y · identity y) (g · identity z)
        (! id_left (identity y)))) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (! assoc (identity y) (identity y)
          (g · identity z))) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity y))
        (assoc (identity y) g (identity z)))) @
assoc (identity x) f
  (identity y · (identity y · g · identity z)) @
assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
  (identity y · g · identity z) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof y
       z g) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f · identity y)
  (# (functor_identity G) f)
  (# (functor_identity G) g)
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       y f) @ ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f g =
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (assoc f g (identity z)) @
assoc (identity x) (f · g) (identity z) @
! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x z
    (f · g)

        apply (homset_property G).
    Qed.

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor (functor_identity (pr1 G)) D₂ D₁

HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor (functor_identity (pr1 G)) D₂ D₁
