HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_data (functor_identity (pr1 G)) D₂ D₁
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity (pr1 G))
          D₂ D₁, disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_data (functor_identity (pr1 G)) D₂ D₁
 exact to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data.
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity (pr1 G))
          D₂ D₁, disp_functor_axioms FF)
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data
 exact to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_laws.
    Defined.

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_composite_data
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂)

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_composite_data
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂)

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x),
disp_functor_composite_data
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F x xx =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂) x xx
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x y : pr1 G) (f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₂ x)
(yy : D₂ y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(♯ (disp_functor_composite_data
      to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G) y))
                                                 (?p y
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ functor_identity (pr1 G) x,
         functor_identity (pr1 G) y ⟧,
   disp_functor_composite_data
     to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂) y yy)
  (id_left (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f) @
   ! id_right (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity (pr1 G) x))
     (?p x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂))
                    ff)%mor_disp

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x : pr1 G) (xx : D₂ x),
disp_functor_composite_data
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F x xx =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂) x xx
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: pr1 G
xx: D₂ x
F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) = xx

        apply (homotweqinvweq (Fo x)).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x y : pr1 G) (f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₂ x)
(yy : D₂ y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(♯ (disp_functor_composite_data
      to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G) y))
                                                 ((λ 
                                                 (x0 : 
                                                 pr1 G)
                                                 (xx0 : 
                                                 D₂ x0),
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo
                                                 x0)
                                                 xx0
                                                 :
                                                 disp_functor_composite_data
                                                 to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv
                                                 F x0
                                                 xx0 =
                                                 pr1
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 x0
                                                 xx0)
                                                 y yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ functor_identity (pr1 G) x,
         functor_identity (pr1 G) y ⟧,
   disp_functor_composite_data
     to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂) y yy)
  (id_left (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f) @
   ! id_right (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity (pr1 G) x))
     ((λ (x0 : pr1 G) (xx0 : D₂ x0),
       homotweqinvweq (Fo x0) xx0
       :
       disp_functor_composite_data
         to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv F x0 xx0 =
       pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂) x0 xx0) x xx) ;; 
   ♯ (pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₂)) ff)%mor_disp
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ F
   (disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
      (transportb
         (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
          F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
          z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
         (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
            x y f)
         (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
            (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ F

      (transportb

          F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
          z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
         (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
            x y f)

                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid

xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(transportb
   (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
    F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
    z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
   (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
      y f)
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; 
    idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
      (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                         (idpath y)
                                         (homotweqinvweq
                                            (Fo y) yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(transportf
   (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
    F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[
    z] F y (invmap (Fo y) yy))
   (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
        x y f)
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; 
    idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
      (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                         (idpath y)
                                         (homotweqinvweq
                                            (Fo y) yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath y)
                                       (homotweqinvweq
                                          (Fo y) yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
        (assoc (identity x) f
           (identity y · identity y))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp)) =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂

HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
             (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 y)
                                               (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

yy: D₂ y

xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y

x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy))%mor_disp =
?t2

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; transportb (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
            (id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
            (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
               (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy @
                homotweqinvweq (Fo y) yy))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; 
   (ff ;; transportb (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, yy -->[ z] yy)
            (id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
            (idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (idpath yy))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @

                                                 yy)))%mor_disp) =

ff: xx -->[ f] yy

xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y

(ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (idpath yy))%mor_disp =

          apply id_right_disp.

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))

   transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff)%mor_disp =

  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)

f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @

   transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right f) ff)%mor_disp =

  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x)) (! id_right f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp) =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x)) (! id_right f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y) f (identity y)
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr11 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   F x (invmap (Fo x) xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: pr1 G
f: pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₂ x
yy: D₂ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
maponpaths (compose (identity x)) (! id_right f) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y) @
assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f · identity y) f
  (identity y)
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       y f) = id_left f @ ! id_right f

        apply (homset_property G).
    Qed.

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_composite_data F
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁)

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
disp_functor_composite_data F
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁)

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x : G) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_functor_composite_data F
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv x xx =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁) x xx
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x y : G) (f : G ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(♯ (disp_functor_composite_data F
      to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                                 (?p y
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ functor_identity G x,
         functor_identity G y ⟧,
   disp_functor_composite_data F
     to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁) y yy)
  (id_left (# (functor_identity G) f) @
   ! id_right (# (functor_identity G) f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
     (?p x xx) ;; ♯ (pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁))
                    ff)%mor_disp

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x : G) (xx : D₁ x),
disp_functor_composite_data F
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv x xx =
pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁) x xx
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x: G
xx: D₁ x
invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) = xx

        apply (homotinvweqweq (Fo x)).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
∏ (x y : G) (f : G ⟦ x, y ⟧) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(♯ (disp_functor_composite_data F
      to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                                 ((λ 
                                                 (x0 : G)
                                                 (xx0 : 
                                                 D₁ x0),
                                                 homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo
                                                 x0)
                                                 xx0
                                                 :
                                                 disp_functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv
                                                 x0
                                                 xx0 =
                                                 pr1
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 x0
                                                 xx0)
                                                 y yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ functor_identity G x,
         functor_identity G y ⟧,
   disp_functor_composite_data F
     to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv x xx -->[
   z] pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁) y yy)
  (id_left (# (functor_identity G) f) @
   ! id_right (# (functor_identity G) f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
     ((λ (x0 : G) (xx0 : D₁ x0),
       homotinvweqweq (Fo x0) xx0
       :
       disp_functor_composite_data F
         to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv x0 xx0 =
       pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁) x0 xx0) x xx) ;; 
   ♯ (pr1 (disp_functor_identity D₁)) ff)%mor_disp
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
   (transportb
      (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
       F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[
       z] F y (invmap (Fo y) (F y yy)))
      (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
         x y f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
       idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
         (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)))) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
   (transportf
      (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
       F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[
       z] F y (invmap (Fo y) (F y yy)))
      (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
           x y f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
       idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
         (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)))) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
   (transportf
      (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
       F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[
       z] F y (invmap (Fo y) (F y yy)))
      (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
           x y f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
       idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
         (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)))) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (♯ F
     (transportf
        (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp))

   (transportf

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
(disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
   (transportf
      (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
       F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[
       z] F y (invmap (Fo y) (F y yy)))
      (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
           x y f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
       idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
         (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)))) ;; disp_functor_ff_inv
                                                 F HF₂
                                                 (♯ F
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp

          apply (disp_functor_ff_inv_compose F HF₂).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[
         z] F y (invmap (Fo y) (F y yy)))
        (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
             x y f)
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
         idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
           (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy))) ;; 
      ♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
           (homotinvweqweq (Fo y) yy)))%mor_disp) =
disp_functor_ff_inv F HF₂
  (♯ F
     (transportf
        (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
        (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[
      z] F y (invmap (Fo y) (F y yy)))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy))) ;; ♯ F
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[
      z] F y (invmap (Fo y) (F y yy)))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy))) ;; ♯ F
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity x · f · identity y)
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
        (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
             x y f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; ♯ F
                                                (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; ♯ F
                                             (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
      invmap (Fo x) (F x xx) -->[ z] yy)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp)

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; ♯ F
                                             (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; ♯ F
                                             (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; ♯ F
                                             (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath y) (homotinvweqweq (Fo y) yy)) =
?t2

          apply (disp_functor_idtoiso_disp F).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; transportb
                                             (λ z : 
                                                 G
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 G y,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                              F y
                                                (invmap
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy)) -->[
                                              z] F y
                                                 yy)
                                             (functor_id
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 G) y)
                                             (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                                (maponpaths
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff))

                                                 G y))
                                                (maponpaths

                                                 (homotinvweqweq

     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
     (maponpaths
        (compose (identity x · f · identity y))

                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp) =

  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))

HF₂: disp_functor_ff F

x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @

  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
        (identity (functor_identity G y)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;;

         (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp

                                                 G y))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp) =

  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))

     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))

   (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
      (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                              (maponpaths
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp =

  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)

  ((♯ F)%mor_disp

  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @

                                                 yy))))%mor_disp =

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                           (maponpaths
                                              (F y)
                                              (homotinvweqweq
                                                 (Fo y)
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
?t2

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   transportb
     (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, F y yy -->[ z] F y yy)
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy) @
         maponpaths (F y) (homotinvweqweq (Fo y) yy))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff))

yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)

     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, F y yy -->[ z] F y yy)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy) @
         maponpaths (F y) (homotinvweqweq (Fo y) yy))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy) @
         maponpaths (F y) (homotinvweqweq (Fo y) yy)))%mor_disp) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff))

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! homotweqinvweq (Fo y) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y) (homotinvweqweq (Fo y) yy)))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff))

yy: D₁ y

maponpaths (F y) (homotinvweqweq (Fo y) yy) = ?t2

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (idpath (transportf D₂ (idpath y) (F y yy))))%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx) ;; ff))

  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))

     (functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x) f)
     (♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx)) ;; ♯ F ff)%mor_disp) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))

     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
x, y: G
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (id_left f @ ! id_right f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f)
     (♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx)) ;; ♯ F ff)%mor_disp) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx))) (F y yy))
  (! id_right (identity x · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff)%mor_disp

     (λ z : G ⟦ functor_identity G x,
            functor_identity G x ⟧,
      F x (invmap (Fo x) (F x xx)) -->[ z] F x xx)
     (functor_id (functor_identity G) x)

        (maponpaths (F x) (homotinvweqweq (Fo x) xx))) ;; 
   ♯ F ff)%mor_disp =

   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · f · identity y)
     (# (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof
          x y f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (homotweqinvweq (Fo x) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ F ff)%mor_disp

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
cancel_postcomposition
  (identity (functor_identity G x))
  (# (functor_identity G) (identity x))
  (# (functor_identity G) f)
  (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x) @
! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x) f @
maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
  (id_left f @ ! id_right f) =
! id_right (identity x · f) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x · f))
  (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))) @
assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
  (identity (functor_identity G y)) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x · f · identity y))
  (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · f · identity y)
  (# (functor_identity G) f)
  (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
  (! to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv_data_subproof x
       y f) @
! functor_comp (functor_identity G) f (identity y)

        apply homset_property.
    Qed.

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
D₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso G)] D₁
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(?pr1 ;; F)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂) (pr2 (identity_z_iso G))
  (id_disp D₂)
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(λ _ : (?pr1 ;; F)%mor_disp =
       transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
         (pr2 (identity_z_iso G)) (id_disp D₂),
 (F ;; ?pr1)%mor_disp =
 transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁) (pr1 (identity_z_iso G))
   (id_disp D₁)) ?pr10

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
D₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso G)] D₁
 exact to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv.
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv ;; F)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂) (pr2 (identity_z_iso G))
  (id_disp D₂)
 abstract
          (use disp_functor_eq ;
           rewrite transportb_disp_setgrpd ;
           exact to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_left).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF₁: ∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
HF₂: disp_functor_ff F
Fo:= λ x : G, make_weq (F x) (HF₁ x): ∏ x : G, D₁ x ≃ D₂ x
(λ _ : (to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv ;; F)%mor_disp =
       transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
         (pr2 (identity_z_iso G)) (id_disp D₂),
 (F ;; to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_inv)%mor_disp =
 transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁) (pr1 (identity_z_iso G))
   (id_disp D₁))
  to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_subproof
 abstract
          (use disp_functor_eq ;
           rewrite transportb_disp_setgrpd ;
           exact to_is_z_iso_disp_disp_setgrpd_right).
    Defined.
  End ToIso.

  Section FromIso.
    Context (HF : is_z_iso_disp
                    (D := disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
                    (identity_z_iso _)
                    F).

    Let F' : disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
      := inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF.

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x: G
xx: D₁ x
F' x (F x xx) = xx

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x: G
xx: D₁ x
F' x (F x xx) = xx

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x: G
xx: D₁ x
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso G))
  (id_disp D₁) x xx = xx

      apply transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob.
    Qed.

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

x: G
xx: D₂ x
F x (F' x xx) = xx

x: G
xx: D₂ x
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
  (id_disp D₂) x xx = xx

      apply transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob.
    Qed.

x: G
isweq (F x)

x: G
D₂ (functor_identity G x) → D₁ x

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x: G
∏ x0 : D₁ x, ?g (F x x0) = x0

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x: G
∏ y : D₂ (functor_identity G x), F x (?g y) = y

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x: G
D₂ (functor_identity G x) → D₁ x
 exact (λ xx, F' x xx).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x: G
∏ x0 : D₁ x,
(λ xx : D₂ (functor_identity G x), F' x xx) (F x x0) =
x0

F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x: G
xx: D₁ x
F' x (F x xx) = xx

        apply is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law.
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x: G
∏ y : D₂ (functor_identity G x),
F x ((λ xx : D₂ (functor_identity G x), F' x xx) y) =
y

x: G

F x (F' x xx) = xx

        apply is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_right_law.
    Qed.

x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
→ xx -->[ f] yy

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
?g ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff) x0) = x0
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy,
(λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff) (?g y0) = y0

x, y: G

F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
→ xx -->[ f] yy
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
xx -->[ f] yy

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
idtoiso (idpath (functor_identity G x))
· # (functor_identity G) (# (functor_identity G) f)
· idtoiso (idpath (functor_identity G y)) = f

        abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite id_left, id_right ;
           apply idpath).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
(λ ff : F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy,
 transportf
   (λ z : G ⟦ functor_identity G x,
          functor_identity G y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
   (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F' ff ;; 
    idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp)
  ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff) x0) = x0
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F'
                                                (♯ F
                                                 ff) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F'
                                                (♯ F
                                                 ff) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F'
                                                (♯ F
                                                 ff) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F'
                                              (♯ F ff) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp = 
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F'
                                              (♯ F ff))%mor_disp =
?y'

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(♯ F')%mor_disp (♯ F ff) = ?t2

          exact (!(disp_functor_eq_mor (!(inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) ff)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; transportf
                                                (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 G
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 G x,
                                                 functor_identity
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 (F ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 HF) x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 (F ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 HF) y
                                                 yy)
                                                (id_right
                                                 (identity
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G x)
                                                 · 
                                                 (# 
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G))%cat
                                                 f) @
                                                 id_left
                                                 ((# 
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G))%cat
                                                 f))
                                                (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G x))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                 ♯ (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                                                 (identity_z_iso
                                                 G))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 D₁))
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx
        ((F ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF) y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right
           (identity (functor_identity G x)
            · (# (functor_identity G))%cat f) @
         id_left ((# (functor_identity G))%cat f)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G x))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                 ♯ (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                                                 (identity_z_iso
                                                 G))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 D₁))
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy))) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity x
         · (identity (functor_identity G x)
            · # (functor_identity G) f
            · identity (functor_identity G y)))
        (identity x · f) (identity y)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (id_right
              (identity (functor_identity G x)
               · # (functor_identity G) f) @
            id_left (# (functor_identity G) f))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G x))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                 ♯ (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                                                 (identity_z_iso
                                                 G))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 D₁))
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp) =
ff

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
