x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                               transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 x xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 y yy)
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (identity
                                                 x · f) @
                                                 id_left
                                                 f)
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity

                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
                                               idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 HF x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))
                                                 yy)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (identity
                                                 x · f)
                                                 (identity
                                                 y)
                                                 (identity
                                                 y))
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 HF x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))
                                                 yy)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (identity
                                                 x) f
                                                 (identity
                                                 y
                                                 · 
                                                 identity
                                                 y))
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 pr1 G
                                                 ⟦ x,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 x xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 y yy)
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (identity
                                                 x · f) @
                                                 id_left
                                                 f)
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 x xx)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 y yy))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (identity
                                                 x) f
                                                 (identity
                                                 y))
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                 (ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy)))) ;; 
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))))))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (assoc (identity x) f
                 (identity y · identity y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
            (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
               (disp_functor_eq_ob
                  (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF))
                  xx) ;; (transportf
                            (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                             pr1
                               (transportb
                                  (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
                                  (id_left
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 G)))
                                  (disp_functor_identity
                                     D₁)) x xx -->[
                             z] pr1
                                  (transportb
                                     (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
                                     (id_left
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 G)))
                                     (disp_functor_identity
                                        D₁)) y yy)
                            (id_right (identity x · f) @
                             id_left f)
                            (transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (pr1
                                     (transportb
                                        (mor_disp D₁
                                           D₁)
                                        (id_left
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 G)))
                                        (disp_functor_identity
                                           D₁)) x xx)
                                  (pr1
                                     (transportb
                                        (mor_disp D₁
                                           D₁)
                                        (id_left
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 G)))
                                        (disp_functor_identity
                                           D₁)) y yy))
                               (assoc (identity x) f
                                  (identity y))
                               (idtoiso_disp
                                  (idpath x)
                                  (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                     (id_left
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 G)))
                                     (disp_functor_identity
                                        D₁) xx) ;; 
                                (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                         (idpath y)
                                         (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                              (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                              (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                              yy)))) ;; 
                          (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                             (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                     HF) yy) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (assoc (identity x) f
                 (identity y · identity y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
            (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
               (disp_functor_eq_ob
                  (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF))
                  xx) ;; transportf
                           (mor_disp
                              (pr1
                                 (transportb
                                    (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
                                    (id_left
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 G)))
                                    (disp_functor_identity
                                       D₁)) x xx) yy)
                           (cancel_postcomposition
                              (identity x · f
                               · identity y) f
                              (identity y · identity y)
                              (id_right
                                 (identity x · f) @
                               id_left f))
                           (transportf
                              (mor_disp
                                 (pr1
                                    (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 G)))
                                       (disp_functor_identity
                                          D₁)) x xx)
                                 yy)
                              (cancel_postcomposition
                                 (identity x
                                  · (f · identity y))
                                 (identity x · f
                                  · identity y)
                                 (identity y
                                  · identity y)
                                 (assoc (identity x) f
                                    (identity y)))
                              (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                    (id_left
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 G)))
                                    (disp_functor_identity
                                       D₁) xx) ;; 
                               (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath y)
                                        (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                             (id_left
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                             (disp_functor_identity
                                                D₁) yy)) ;; 
                               (idtoiso_disp
                                  (idpath y)
                                  (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                     (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                          HF) yy) ;; 
                                idtoiso_disp
                                  (idpath y)
                                  (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                     yy))))))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (assoc (identity x) f
                 (identity y · identity y)))
           (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
              (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                 (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                    (cancel_postcomposition
                       (identity x · f · identity y) f
                       (identity y · identity y)
                       (id_right (identity x · f) @
                        id_left f))))
              (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                 (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                    (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                       (cancel_postcomposition
                          (identity x
                           · (f · identity y))
                          (identity x · f · identity y)
                          (identity y · identity y)
                          (assoc (identity x) f
                             (identity y)))))
                 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                    (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                         xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath x)
                                   (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                      (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                              HF)) xx) ;; 
                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                    (idpath x)
                                    (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 G)))
                                       (disp_functor_identity
                                          D₁) xx) ;; 
                                  (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                           (idpath y)
                                           (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                yy)) ;; 
                                  (idtoiso_disp
                                     (idpath y)
                                     (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                        (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                             HF) yy) ;; 
                                   idtoiso_disp
                                     (idpath y)
                                     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                        yy)))))%mor_disp))))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                               (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                (ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
                                                (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))))%mor_disp =
ff

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)

   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f

           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))

   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob

                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))

                                                 y)

                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))))%mor_disp =
?b

ff: xx -->[ f] yy

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (disp_functor_eq_ob (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)
      yy) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
               (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
?t2

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₁)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                               (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                (ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
                                                transportb
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 G
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 y yy -->[
                                                 z] yy)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (idtoiso
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)))
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                               (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                (ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
                                                transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 G
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 pr1
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (! 
                                                 id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 y yy -->[
                                                 z] yy)
                                                 (! 
                                                 id_left
                                                 (idtoiso
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)))
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                 (ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy)) ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp) =
ff

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @

     (identity y) @

     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob

                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy)) ;;

                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp =

yy: D₁ y

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @

     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @

     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                               transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (! 
                                                 id_left

                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 x xx)
                                                 yy)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (identity
                                                 x)

                                                 · 
                                                 identity
                                                 y)
                                                 (idtoiso
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)))

                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left

                                                 G)))

                                                 y)

                                                 y)

                                                 G)))

                                                 y)

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
              (idtoiso (idpath y)))))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                 (assoc f (identity y)
                    (idtoiso (idpath y))))))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
         (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
            (disp_functor_eq_ob
               (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) ;; 
          (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
             (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; 
           (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                          (id_left
                             (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                          (disp_functor_identity D₁)
                          yy) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                      (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                           HF) yy @
                                    is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                      yy))))))%mor_disp)) =
ff

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @

                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;;

                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;;

                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1

                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy) ;;

                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @

                                                 yy))))))%mor_disp =

                                                 (!

                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))))))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                               (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                (ff ;; 
                                                 (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy) ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))))))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) yy) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                            (idpath y)
                                            (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                               (! 
                                                inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                               yy @
                                             is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                               yy))%mor_disp =
?t2

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₁)).

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @

     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (maponpaths (compose f)
                 (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath

                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))))%mor_disp) =
ff

transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))

     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @

     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @

     (identity y) @

     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x)
        (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))))
     (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
        (assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (f · idtoiso (idpath y)))
        (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
           (assoc
              (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
              (idtoiso (idpath y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
            idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF))
                 xx) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                          (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                             (id_left
                                (functor_identity
                                   (pr1 G)))
                             (disp_functor_identity D₁)
                             xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                            (idpath y)
                                            (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                             disp_functor_eq_ob
                                               (! 
                                                inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                               yy @
                                             is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                               yy))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
          (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
        (! assoc (identity x · identity x)
             (identity x) (f · idtoiso (idpath y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
           (! assoc
                (identity x · identity x · identity x)
                f (idtoiso (idpath y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
            idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF))
                 xx) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                          (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                             (id_left
                                (functor_identity
                                   (pr1 G)))
                             (disp_functor_identity D₁)
                             xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                            (idpath y)
                                            (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                             disp_functor_eq_ob
                                               (! 
                                                inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                               yy @
                                             is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                               yy))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
