        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF))
                                                 xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportb
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      xx -->[
      z] pr1
           (transportf (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
              (! id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
              (disp_functor_identity D₁)) x xx)
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)

                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity

                                                 G)))

                                                 yy @

                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @

                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
ff

  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f

       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)

        (maponpaths

        (cancel_postcomposition

           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

           (identity x · f · identity y) f

     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @

     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @

     (identity y) @

     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      xx -->[
      z] pr1
           (transportf (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
              (! id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
              (disp_functor_identity D₁)) x xx)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp

                                                 (disp_functor_identity

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
        (idtoiso (idpath y))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
           (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
           (cancel_postcomposition
              (idtoiso (idpath x))
              (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
             (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
             (disp_functor_identity D₁) yy @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) yy @
         is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)

     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)

   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
    disp_functor_eq_ob
      (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx) ;; ff ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) yy @
    disp_functor_eq_ob (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)
      yy @ is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
?t2

   (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @

                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xx))%mor_disp =
?y'

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₁)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportb (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₁) yy @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) yy @
      is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₁) yy @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) yy @
      is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
        (idtoiso (idpath y))
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
             (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
             (disp_functor_identity D₁) yy @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) yy @
         is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 yy @
                                                 is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 yy @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (!

                                                 yy @

                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
?b

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

        (cancel_postcomposition

   maponpaths (compose (identity x))

        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f

     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @

     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @

     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
  (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
       (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
       (disp_functor_identity D₁) yy @
   disp_functor_eq_ob (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)
     yy @ is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy) = ?t2

          apply idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_refl.

        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))

           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 G
                                                 ⟦ y,
                                                 y ⟧,
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z] yy)
                                                 (! 
                                                 setcategory_refl_idtoiso
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 yy))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
        (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; 
      id_disp yy)%mor_disp) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff ;; id_disp
                                                 yy)%mor_disp =
ff

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧

transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @

     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))

        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
     (id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp) =
ff

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

yy: D₁ y

  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @

     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))

        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f

           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)

   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp) =

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
     disp_functor_eq_ob
       (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
    transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
      (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
      (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
  ((! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx @
    disp_functor_eq_ob
      (! (! inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)) xx) @
   transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
     (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
     (disp_functor_identity D₁) xx) = ?y'

          apply idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_refl.
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportb (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
     (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x))
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
