x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] xx)
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x))
     (id_disp xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
        (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (... · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (...))
        (id_right ... @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (... · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (...))
        (id_right ... @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (... · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (...))
        (id_right ... @ id_left f)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_left f) ff) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x · (f · ...)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (...) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (... · ...))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose ...) (... @ ...)) @
   is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f) ff = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isaset (pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧)

        apply (homset_property G).
      
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy,
(λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  ((λ ff : F x xx -->[
           # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy,
    transportf
      (λ z : G ⟦ functor_identity G x,
             functor_identity G y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
      (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
       ♯ F' ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                    (idpath (functor_identity G y))
                    (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp)
     y0) = y0
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  ((λ ff : F x xx -->[
           # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy,
    transportf
      (λ z : G ⟦ functor_identity G x,
             functor_identity G y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
      (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
       ♯ F' ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                    (idpath (functor_identity G y))
                    (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp)
     ff) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (transportf (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F'
                                                 ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  ((♯ F)%mor_disp
     ((idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
       ♯ F' ff)%mor_disp ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                              (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                 yy))) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity G)
        (identity x · f) (identity y))
     (♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
         ♯ F' ff) ;; ♯ F
                       (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                          (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                             yy)))%mor_disp) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
          (identity x · f) (identity y))
     (♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; 
         ♯ F' ff) ;; ♯ F
                       (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                          (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                             yy)))%mor_disp) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) ;; ♯ F'
                                                 ff) ;; 
   ♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y (F' y (F y yy))))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x) f)
     (♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      ♯ F (♯ F' ff)) ;; ♯ F
                          (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                             (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                yy)))%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y (F' y (F y yy))))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f)
     (♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      ♯ F (♯ F' ff)) ;; ♯ F
                          (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                             (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                yy)))%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f)
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
        (! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
             (identity x) f))
     (♯ F
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      ♯ F (♯ F' ff) ;; ♯ F
                         (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                            (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                               yy)))%mor_disp) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   ♯ F (♯ F' ff) ;; ♯ F
                      (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                         (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                            yy)))%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   ♯ F (♯ F' ff) ;; ♯ F
                      (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                         (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                            yy)))%mor_disp = ?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
?b = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   ♯ F (♯ F' ff) ;; ♯ F
                      (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                         (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                            yy)))%mor_disp = ?b

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)) = ?t2

          apply (disp_functor_idtoiso_disp F).

  (cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @

       (identity x · f) (identity y) @

   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   ♯ F (♯ F' ff) ;; idtoiso_disp
                      (idpath (functor_identity G y))
                      (maponpaths (F y)
                         (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                            yy)))%mor_disp = ?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; ♯ F
                                                 (♯ F'
                                                 ff) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
   (maponpaths (F y)
      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; ♯ F
                                                 (♯ F'
                                                 ff))%mor_disp =
?y'

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp (♯ F' ff) = ?t2

          exact (!(disp_functor_eq_mor (!(z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) ff)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity G x))
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x))
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z : G
            ⟦ functor_identity G
                (functor_identity G x),
            functor_identity G (functor_identity G y)
            ⟧,
      (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF ;; F)
        (functor_identity G x) (F x xx) -->[
      z] (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF ;; F)
           (functor_identity G y) (F y yy))
     (id_right
        (identity
           (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x))
         · (# (functor_identity G))%cat
             ((# (functor_identity G))%cat f)) @
      id_left
        ((# (functor_identity G))%cat
           ((# (functor_identity G))%cat f)))
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath
           (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
        (disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
           (F x xx)) ;; ♯ (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                             (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                (identity_z_iso G))
                             (id_disp D₂)) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y)))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
     (maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity G x))
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x))
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x xx)
        ((inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF ;; F)
           (functor_identity G y) (F y yy)))
     (maponpaths
        (compose (identity (functor_identity G x)))
        (id_right
           (identity
              (functor_identity G
                 (functor_identity G x))
            · (# (functor_identity G))%cat
                ((# (functor_identity G))%cat f)) @
         id_left
           ((# (functor_identity G))%cat
              ((# (functor_identity G))%cat f))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      (idtoiso_disp
         (idpath
            (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
         (disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) ;; ♯ (transportb
                              (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                              (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                 (identity_z_iso G))
                              (id_disp D₂)) ff ;; 
       idtoiso_disp
         (idpath
            (functor_identity G (functor_identity G y)))
         (disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy)))) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
     (maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity G x))
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x))
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity G x)
         · (identity
              (functor_identity G
                 (functor_identity G x))
            · # (functor_identity G)
                (# (functor_identity G) f)
            · identity
                (functor_identity G
                   (functor_identity G y))))
        (identity (functor_identity G x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f)
        (identity (functor_identity G y))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity (functor_identity G x)))
           (id_right
              (identity
                 (functor_identity G
                    (functor_identity G x))
               · # (functor_identity G)
                   (# (functor_identity G) f)) @
            id_left
              (# (functor_identity G)
                 (# (functor_identity G) f)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      (idtoiso_disp
         (idpath
            (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
         (disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) ;; ♯ (transportb
                              (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                              (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                 (identity_z_iso G))
                              (id_disp D₂)) ff ;; 
       idtoiso_disp
         (idpath
            (functor_identity G (functor_identity G y)))
         (disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy))) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
        (maponpaths (F y)
           (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · (identity
           (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x))
         · # (functor_identity G)
             (# (functor_identity G) f)
         · identity
             (functor_identity G
                (functor_identity G y))))
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (maponpaths
        (compose (identity (functor_identity G x)))
        (id_right
           (identity
              (functor_identity G
                 (functor_identity G x))
            · # (functor_identity G)
                (# (functor_identity G) f)) @
         id_left
           (# (functor_identity G)
              (# (functor_identity G) f)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity G x))
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x))
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp
      (idpath
         (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    ♯ (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
         (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
         (id_disp D₂)) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                               (idpath
                                  (functor_identity G
                                     (functor_identity
                                        G y)))
                               (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                  (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                       HF) (F y yy))) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
     (maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity G x))
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x))
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)

     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @

     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))

      (idpath

      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    ♯ (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
         (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
         (id_disp D₂)) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                               (idpath
                                  (functor_identity G
                                     (functor_identity
                                        G y)))
                               (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                  (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                       HF) (F y yy))) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
     (maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?b

     (identity (functor_identity G y))

        (identity (functor_identity G x))

        (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)

          f) @

     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))

     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;;

      (idpath
         (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    ♯ (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
         (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
         (id_disp D₂)) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                               (idpath

                                        G y)))

                                       HF) (F y yy))) ;;

     (maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

(idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G x)))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (!

                                                 (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
