                                                 G))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 D₂))
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y)))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
   (maponpaths (F y)
      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G x)))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF))
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
                                                 ♯ (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₂ D₂)
                                                 (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                                 (identity_z_iso
                                                 G))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 D₂))
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y)))
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))))%mor_disp =
?y'

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp
   (idpath (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
   (disp_functor_eq_ob
      (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
 ♯ (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
      (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
      (id_disp D₂)) ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                            (idpath
                               (functor_identity G
                                  (functor_identity G
                                     y)))
                            (disp_functor_eq_ob
                               (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                    HF) (F y yy)))%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp
   (idpath (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
   (disp_functor_eq_ob
      (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
 ♯ (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
      (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
      (id_disp D₂)) ff)%mor_disp = ?y'

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(♯ (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
      (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
      (id_disp D₂)))%mor_disp ff = ?t2

          apply transportb_disp_setgrpd_mor.
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · (identity
           (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x))
         · # (functor_identity G)
             (# (functor_identity G) f)
         · identity
             (functor_identity G
                (functor_identity G y))))
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (maponpaths
        (compose (identity (functor_identity G x)))
        (id_right
           (identity
              (functor_identity G
                 (functor_identity G x))
            · # (functor_identity G)
                (# (functor_identity G) f)) @
         id_left
           (# (functor_identity G)
              (# (functor_identity G) f)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity G x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (identity (functor_identity G y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity G x))
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x))
        (# (functor_identity G) f)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity G) x)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
         · # (functor_identity G) f))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity G) y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x)
      · # (functor_identity G) f)
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity x · f))
     (# (functor_identity G) (identity y))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity G) (identity x)
          f) @
   ! functor_comp (functor_identity G)
       (identity x · f) (identity y) @
   maponpaths # (functor_identity G)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G x))
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp
      (idpath
         (functor_identity G (functor_identity G x)))
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    transportf
      (λ z : G
             ⟦ (functor_identity_data G,,
                is_functor_identity G)
                 (functor_identity G x),
             (functor_identity_data G,,
              is_functor_identity G)
               (functor_identity G y) ⟧,
       pr1
         (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
            (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
            (id_disp D₂)) (functor_identity G x)
         (F x xx) -->[
       z] pr1
            (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
               (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                  (identity_z_iso G)) (id_disp D₂))
            (functor_identity G y) (F y yy))
      (id_right
         (identity
            ((functor_identity_data G,,
              is_functor_identity G)
               (functor_identity G x))
          · (# (functor_identity_data G,,
                is_functor_identity G))%cat
              ((# (functor_identity G))%cat f)) @
       id_left
         ((# (functor_identity_data G,,
              is_functor_identity G))%cat
            ((# (functor_identity G))%cat f)))
      (idtoiso_disp
         (idpath
            ((functor_identity_data G,,
              is_functor_identity G)
               (functor_identity G x)))
         (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
            (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso G))
            (id_disp D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ♯ (pr1
                                           (id_disp D₂))
                                        ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 ((functor_identity_data
                                                 G,,
                                                 is_functor_identity
                                                 G)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 G y)))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                                 (identity_z_iso
                                                 G))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 D₂)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;; 
    idtoiso_disp
      (idpath
         (functor_identity G (functor_identity G y)))
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy))) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity G y))
     (maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    transportf
      (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
       pr1
         (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
            (disp_functor_identity D₂)) x (F x xx) -->[
       z] pr1
            (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
               (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
               (disp_functor_identity D₂)) y (F y yy))
      (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
            (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
       idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
         (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
              (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
              (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy))) ;; 
    idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy))) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      transportf
        (mor_disp
           (F x
              (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF x (F x xx)))
           (F y yy))
        (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
           (identity y))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp
              (F x
                 (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF x
                    (F x xx))) (F y yy))
           (assoc (identity x) f
              (identity y · identity y))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
                 (F x xx)) ;; (transportf
                                 (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧,
                                  pr1
                                    (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 G)))
                                       (disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂)) x
                                    (F x xx) -->[
                                  z] pr1
                                       (transportb
                                          (mor_disp D₂
                                             D₂)
                                          (id_left
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 G)))
                                          (disp_functor_identity
                                             D₂)) y
                                       (F y yy))
                                 (id_right
                                    (identity x · f) @
                                  id_left f)
                                 (transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (pr1
                                          (transportb
                                             (mor_disp
                                                D₂ D₂)
                                             (id_left
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                             (disp_functor_identity
                                                D₂)) x
                                          (F x xx))
                                       (pr1
                                          (transportb
                                             (mor_disp
                                                D₂ D₂)
                                             (id_left
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                             (disp_functor_identity
                                                D₂)) y
                                          (F y yy)))
                                    (assoc
                                       (identity x) f
                                       (identity y))
                                    (idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath x)
                                       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                          (id_left
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 G)))
                                          (disp_functor_identity
                                             D₂)
                                          (F x xx)) ;; 
                                     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 y)
                                              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))))) ;; 
                               (idtoiso_disp
                                  (idpath y)
                                  (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                     (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                          HF) (F y yy)) ;; 
                                idtoiso_disp
                                  (idpath y)
                                  (maponpaths (F y)
                                     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                        yy)))))))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (assoc (identity x) f
                 (identity y · identity y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (maponpaths (F x)
                 (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
            (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
               (disp_functor_eq_ob
                  (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
                  (F x xx)) ;; (transportf
                                  (λ z : pr1 G ⟦ x, y
                                         ⟧,
                                   pr1
                                     (transportb
                                        (mor_disp D₂
                                           D₂)
                                        (id_left
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 G)))
                                        (disp_functor_identity
                                           D₂)) x
                                     (F x xx) -->[
                                   z] pr1
                                        (transportb
                                           (mor_disp
                                              D₂ D₂)
                                           (id_left
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                           (disp_functor_identity
                                              D₂)) y
                                        (F y yy))
                                  (id_right
                                     (identity x · f) @
                                   id_left f)
                                  (transportf
                                     (mor_disp
                                        (pr1
                                           (transportb
                                              (mor_disp
                                                 D₂ D₂)
                                              (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                              (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂))
                                           x (F x xx))
                                        (pr1
                                           (transportb
                                              (mor_disp
                                                 D₂ D₂)
                                              (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                              (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂))
                                           y (F y yy)))
                                     (assoc
                                        (identity x) f
                                        (identity y))
                                     (idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath x)
                                        (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                           (id_left
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                           (disp_functor_identity
                                              D₂)
                                           (F x xx)) ;; 
                                      (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 y)
                                               (! 
                                                transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))))) ;; 
                                (idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                      (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                           HF)
                                      (F y yy)) ;; 
                                 idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (maponpaths (F y)
                                      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                         yy))))))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (assoc (identity x) f
                 (identity y · identity y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (maponpaths (F x)
                 (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
            (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
               (disp_functor_eq_ob
                  (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
                  (F x xx)) ;; transportf
                                 (mor_disp
                                    (pr1
                                       (transportb
                                          (mor_disp D₂
                                             D₂)
                                          (id_left
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 G)))
                                          (disp_functor_identity
                                             D₂)) x
                                       (F x xx))
                                    (F y yy))
                                 (cancel_postcomposition
                                    (identity x · f
                                     · identity y) f
                                    (identity y
                                     · identity y)
                                    (id_right
                                       (identity x · f) @
                                     id_left f))
                                 (transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (pr1
                                          (transportb
                                             (mor_disp
                                                D₂ D₂)
                                             (id_left
                                                (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                             (disp_functor_identity
                                                D₂)) x
                                          (F x xx))
                                       (F y yy))
                                    (cancel_postcomposition
                                       (identity x
                                        · (f
                                           · identity
                                               y))
                                       (identity x · f
                                        · identity y)
                                       (identity y
                                        · identity y)
                                       (assoc
                                          (identity x)
                                          f
                                          (identity y)))
                                    (idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath x)
                                       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                          (id_left
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 G)))
                                          (disp_functor_identity
                                             D₂)
                                          (F x xx)) ;; 
                                     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 y)
                                              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;; 
                                     (idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath y)
                                        (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                           (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                HF)
                                           (F y yy)) ;; 
                                      idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath y)
                                        (maponpaths
                                           (F y)
                                           (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                              yy)))))))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
        (identity y))
     (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y)
              (identity y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (assoc (identity x) f
                 (identity y · identity y)))
           (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
              (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                 (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                    (cancel_postcomposition
                       (identity x · f · identity y) f
                       (identity y · identity y)
                       (id_right (identity x · f) @
                        id_left f))))
              (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
                 (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                    (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                       (cancel_postcomposition
                          (identity x
                           · (f · identity y))
                          (identity x · f · identity y)
                          (identity y · identity y)
                          (assoc (identity x) f
                             (identity y)))))
                 (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                    (maponpaths (F x)
                       (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                            xx)) ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath x)
                                       (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                          (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF))
                                          (F x xx)) ;; 
                                     (idtoiso_disp
                                        (idpath x)
                                        (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                           (id_left
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                           (disp_functor_identity
                                              D₂)
                                           (F x xx)) ;; 
                                      (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 y)
                                               (! 
                                                transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;; 
                                      (idtoiso_disp
                                         (idpath y)
                                         (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                            (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                            (F y yy)) ;; 
                                       idtoiso_disp
                                         (idpath y)
                                         (maponpaths
                                            (F y)
                                            (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                               yy))))))%mor_disp))))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy))) ;; 
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy)) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (maponpaths (F y)
           (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy))) ;; 
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy)) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (maponpaths (F y)
           (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))))))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
?b = ff

x, y: G

f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)

   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @

     (identity y) @

        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @

     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy))) ;; 
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy)) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (maponpaths (F y)
           (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))))))%mor_disp =

G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (disp_functor_eq_ob (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
      (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                     (maponpaths (F y)
                        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                           yy)))%mor_disp = ?t2

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy))) ;; 
     transportb
       (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧,
        pr1
          (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
             (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
             (disp_functor_identity D₂)) y (F y yy) -->[
        z] F y yy) (id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
       (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
          (disp_functor_eq_ob
             (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
           maponpaths (F y)
             (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy))) ;; 
     transportf
       (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧,
        pr1
          (transportf (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
             (! id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
             (disp_functor_identity D₂)) y (F y yy) -->[
        z] F y yy) (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
       (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
          (disp_functor_eq_ob
             (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
           maponpaths (F y)
             (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths
              (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                            (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                               (id_left
                                  (functor_identity
                                     (pr1 G)))
                               (disp_functor_identity
                                  D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
                          (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                        (id_left
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 G)))
                                        (disp_functor_identity
                                           D₂)
                                        (F y yy))) ;; 
                          idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                            (disp_functor_eq_ob
                               (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                    HF) (F y yy) @
                             maponpaths (F y)
                               (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                  yy)))))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy))) ;; 
     idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
       (disp_functor_eq_ob
          (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
        maponpaths (F y)
          (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    transportf
      (mor_disp
         (pr1
            (transportf (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
               (! id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
               (disp_functor_identity D₂)) x (F x xx))
         (F y yy))
      (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
         (idtoiso (idpath y)))
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
            (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
       transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
         (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y)))
         (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                        (id_left
                           (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                        (disp_functor_identity D₂)
                        (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath y)
                                       (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                          (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                               HF)
                                          (F y yy) @
                                        maponpaths
                                          (F y)
                                          (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                             yy)))))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
              (idtoiso (idpath y)))))
     (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
                 (assoc f (identity y)
                    (idtoiso (idpath y))))))
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (maponpaths (F x)
              (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
         (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
            (disp_functor_eq_ob
               (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
               (F x xx)) ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                               (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                  (id_left
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 G)))
                                  (disp_functor_identity
                                     D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
                             (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath y)
                                       (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                            (id_left
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                            (disp_functor_identity
                                               D₂)
                                            (F y yy)) ;; 
                                     idtoiso_disp
                                       (idpath y)
                                       (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                          (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                               HF)
                                          (F y yy) @
                                        maponpaths
                                          (F y)
                                          (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                             yy)))))))%mor_disp)) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
               (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                    (id_left
                       (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                    (disp_functor_identity D₂)
                    (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                      (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                           HF)
                                      (F y yy) @
                                    maponpaths (F y)
                                      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                         yy)))))))%mor_disp =
ff

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

   maponpaths (compose (identity x))

           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))

        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)

         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;;

       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))

               (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                    (id_left

                    (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                      (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                           HF)
                                      (F y yy) @
                                    maponpaths (F y)
                                      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                         yy)))))))%mor_disp =
?b

ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy

  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
               (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                    (id_left
                       (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                    (disp_functor_identity D₂)
                    (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                      (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                           HF)
                                      (F y yy) @

                                      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                         yy)))))))%mor_disp =

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y

(idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy) @
                                                 maponpaths
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp =
?t2

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; transportb
              (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, F y yy -->[ z] F y yy)
              (id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))
              (idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
                 (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                      (id_left
                         (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                      (disp_functor_identity D₂)
                      (F y yy) @
                  disp_functor_eq_ob
                    (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
                    (F y yy) @
                  maponpaths (F y)
                    (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))))))%mor_disp =
ff

              (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, F y yy -->[ z] F y yy)
