G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
              (maponpaths (compose f)
                 (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) ;; (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                            (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                               (id_left
                                  (functor_identity
                                     (pr1 G)))
                               (disp_functor_identity
                                  D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
                          (ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                   (idpath y)
                                   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                        (id_left
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 G)))
                                        (disp_functor_identity
                                           D₂)
                                        (F y yy) @
                                    disp_functor_eq_ob
                                      (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                           HF)
                                      (F y yy) @
                                    maponpaths (F y)
                                      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                         yy))))))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
      (disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
    (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
       (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; 
     (ff ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
               disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
                 (F y yy) @
               maponpaths (F y)
                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy))))))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x)
        (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))))
     (transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
        (assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (f · idtoiso (idpath y)))
        (transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
           (assoc
              (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
              (idtoiso (idpath y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (maponpaths (F x)
                 (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
            idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
                 (F x xx)) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                                (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                   (id_left
                                      (functor_identity
                                         (pr1 G)))
                                   (disp_functor_identity
                                      D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
            idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
               disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
                 (F y yy) @
               maponpaths (F y)
                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
          (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))))
     (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
        (! assoc (identity x · identity x)
             (identity x) (f · idtoiso (idpath y)))
        (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
           (! assoc
                (identity x · identity x · identity x)
                f (idtoiso (idpath y)))
           (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (maponpaths (F x)
                 (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
            idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
              (disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
                 (F x xx)) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                                (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                   (id_left
                                      (functor_identity
                                         (pr1 G)))
                                   (disp_functor_identity
                                      D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
            idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
              (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
                   (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
               disp_functor_eq_ob
                 (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
                 (F y yy) @
               maponpaths (F y)
                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp))) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
?b = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF))
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
      (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
      (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
    disp_functor_eq_ob (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
      (F y yy) @
    maponpaths (F y)
      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx)) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                 (disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF))
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx)))%mor_disp =
?y'

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x xx -->[
      z] pr1
           (transportf (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
              (! id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
              (disp_functor_identity D₂)) x (F x xx))
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
           (F x xx))) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                           (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                              (id_left
                                 (functor_identity
                                    (pr1 G)))
                              (disp_functor_identity
                                 D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F x xx -->[
      z] pr1
           (transportf (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
              (! id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
              (disp_functor_identity D₂)) x (F x xx))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
           (F x xx))) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                           (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                              (id_left
                                 (functor_identity
                                    (pr1 G)))
                              (disp_functor_identity
                                 D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
        (idtoiso (idpath y))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
           (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
           (cancel_postcomposition
              (idtoiso (idpath x))
              (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (maponpaths (F x)
           (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
           (F x xx)) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                          (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                             (id_left
                                (functor_identity
                                   (pr1 G)))
                             (disp_functor_identity D₂)
                             (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))
                                                 (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy) @
                                                 disp_functor_eq_ob
                                                 (! 
                                                 z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy) @
                                                 maponpaths
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law
                                                 yy)))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

x, y: G

yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧

  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)

   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
