       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
?b = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (maponpaths (F x)
        (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
    disp_functor_eq_ob
      (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
      (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
      (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
   (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
    disp_functor_eq_ob (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
      (F y yy) @
    maponpaths (F y)
      (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
    disp_functor_eq_ob
      (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) ;; 
 idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   (transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
      (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
      (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)))%mor_disp =
?y'

          apply (idtoiso_disp_comp (D := D₂)).
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x xx -->[ z] F x xx)
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((maponpaths (F x)
            (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx))) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x xx -->[ z] F x xx)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((maponpaths (F x)
            (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx))) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
        (idtoiso (idpath y))
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((maponpaths (F x)
            (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
        (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
             (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
             (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
         disp_functor_eq_ob
           (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
         maponpaths (F y)
           (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
?b = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
     (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
          (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
      disp_functor_eq_ob
        (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F y)
        (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
idtoiso_disp (idpath y)
  (! transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
       (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
       (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F y yy) @
   disp_functor_eq_ob (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
     (F y yy) @
   maponpaths (F y)
     (is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law yy)) = ?t2

          apply idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_refl.
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   transportb
     (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, F y yy -->[ z] F y yy)
     (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y))
     (id_disp (F y yy)))%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ y, y ⟧, F y yy -->[ z] F y yy)
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y))
     (id_disp (F y yy)))%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
        (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((maponpaths (F x)
            (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
      id_disp (F y yy))%mor_disp) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff ;; 
   id_disp (F y yy))%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((maponpaths (F x)
            (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff)%mor_disp) =
ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        ((maponpaths (F x)
            (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
          disp_functor_eq_ob
            (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF))
            (F x xx)) @
         transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
           (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff)%mor_disp) =
ff

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f

           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
ff

  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @

     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @

     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)

     (idtoiso (idpath y))

        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)

   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     ((maponpaths (F x)
         (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
       disp_functor_eq_ob
         (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
      transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) ;; ff)%mor_disp =
?b

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

yy: D₁ y

ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy

  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))

              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @

     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))

     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @

     (identity y) @

     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G

x, y: G

(idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
   ((maponpaths (F x)
       (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
     disp_functor_eq_ob
