G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
  ((maponpaths (F x)
      (! is_z_iso_disp_setgrpd_left_law xx) @
    disp_functor_eq_ob
      (! (! z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)) (F x xx)) @
   transportb_disp_setgrpd_ob
     (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 G)))
     (disp_functor_identity D₂) (F x xx)) = ?y'

          apply idtoiso_disp_set_grpd_refl.
        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x xx -->[ z] F x xx)
     (setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x))
     (id_disp (F x xx)) ;; ff)%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x xx -->[ z] F x xx)
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x))
     (id_disp (F x xx)) ;; ff)%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (identity x · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (identity x · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (id_right (...) @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
        (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (id_disp (F x xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (... · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (...))
        (id_right ... @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (id_disp (F x xx) ;; ff)%mor_disp = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (... · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (...))
        (id_right ... @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy)) (id_left f)
     ff) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths
           (compose (identity x · (f · identity y)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (... · f) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity x · (... · f · identity y))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose (...))
        (id_right ... @ id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
     (! id_left f) ff) = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
transportf (mor_disp (F x xx) (F y yy))
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (idtoiso (idpath x)) f
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath x)) @
   ! id_right (idtoiso (idpath x) · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x) · f))
     (! setcategory_refl_idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) f
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · f)
     (identity x · identity x · identity x · f)
     (idtoiso (idpath y))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x)
        (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x))))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x · identity x) f
       (idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
       (f · idtoiso (idpath y)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x)
       (identity x · (f · idtoiso (idpath y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (maponpaths (compose f)
              (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y)))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
           (assoc f (identity y) (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (assoc (identity x) (f · identity y)
           (idtoiso (idpath y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity x · (f · ...)))
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath y))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · (f · identity y))
           (identity x · f · identity y)
           (identity y · identity y)
           (assoc (identity x) f (identity y)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity x · f · identity y) f
           (identity y · identity y)
           (id_right (...) @ id_left f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x) f (identity y · identity y)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (assoc (identity x · f) (identity y) (identity y)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x · f · identity y)
     (identity y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (... · ...))
     (identity x · f) (identity y)
     (maponpaths (compose ...) (... @ ...)) @
   maponpaths (λ f : ... ⟦ x, y ⟧, f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_to_ff_subproof x y f)) ff = ff

        
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
F':= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₂ D₁
x, y: G
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[ # (functor_identity G) f] F y yy
isaset (pr1 G ⟦ x, y ⟧)

        apply (homset_property G).
    Qed.
  End FromIso.
End Isos.


G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
(∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

(∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

isaprop ((∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F)

HF: (∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
∏ x : G, isweq (F x)
 exact (pr1 HF).
    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
HF: (∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
disp_functor_ff F
 exact (pr2 HF).
  
G: setgroupoid

is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F
→ (∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F

 exact (is_z_iso_disp_to_isweq F HF).

isaprop ((∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F)
 abstract
      (use isapropdirprod ; [ | apply isaprop_disp_functor_ff ] ;
       use impred ; intro ;
       apply isapropisweq).

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) D₁ D₂
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F)
 abstract
      (apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp).
Defined.

(** ** 6.2. Proof of univalence *)

is_univalent_in_fibers disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd

D₁, D₂: disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd G
isweq (λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
isweq (λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
D₁ = D₂ ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) D₁ D₂

D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
?w ~ (λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
D₁ = D₂ ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) D₁ D₂
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
(∑
 F : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
       (pr1 D₂),
 (∏ x : G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F)
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) D₁ D₂

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
∏
x : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
      (pr1 D₂),
(λ x0 : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
          (pr1 D₂),
 (∏ x1 : G, isweq (x0 x1)) × disp_functor_ff x0) x
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) x

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
F: disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
  (pr1 D₂)
(∏ x : pr1 G, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F

    apply disp_setgrpd_iso_weq.
  
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
(weqfibtototal
   (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
            (pr1 D₂),
    (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x)
   (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
   (λ F : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
            (pr1 D₂),
    disp_setgrpd_iso_weq F
    :
    (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
             (pr1 D₂),
     (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x) F
    ≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) F)
 ∘ disp_cat_eq (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₂)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_disp_setgrpd D₁ D₂
     (isaprop_is_disp_setgrpd (pr1 D₂)))%weq ~
(λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)
 
G: setgroupoid
D₁, D₂: disp_setgrpd G
p: D₁ = D₂
(weqfibtototal
   (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
            (pr1 D₂),
    (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x)
   (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
   (λ F : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
            (pr1 D₂), disp_setgrpd_iso_weq F)
 ∘ disp_cat_eq (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₂)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_disp_setgrpd D₁ D₂
     (isaprop_is_disp_setgrpd (pr1 D₂)))%weq p =
idtoiso_fiber_disp p

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
(weqfibtototal
   (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
            (pr1 D₁),
    (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x)
   (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
   (λ F : disp_functor (functor_identity G) (pr1 D₁)
            (pr1 D₁), disp_setgrpd_iso_weq F)
 ∘ disp_cat_eq (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_disp_setgrpd D₁ D₁
     (isaprop_is_disp_setgrpd (pr1 D₁)))%weq
  (idpath D₁) = idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁)

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
pr1
  ((weqfibtototal
      (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
               (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
       (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x)
      (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
      (λ F : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
               (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
       disp_setgrpd_iso_weq F)
    ∘ disp_cat_eq (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_disp_setgrpd D₁ D₁
        (isaprop_is_disp_setgrpd (pr1 D₁)))%weq
     (idpath D₁)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
x: D₁ -->[ identity_z_iso G] D₁
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G) x)

      apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
    
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
pr1
  ((weqfibtototal
      (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
               (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
       (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x)
      (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
      (λ F : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
               (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
       disp_setgrpd_iso_weq F)
    ∘ disp_cat_eq (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_disp_setgrpd D₁ D₁
        (isaprop_is_disp_setgrpd (pr1 D₁)))%weq
     (idpath D₁)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
isPredicate disp_functor_axioms
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
pr11 ((weqfibtototal
         (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
                  (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
          (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x)
         (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
         (λ F : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
                  (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
          disp_setgrpd_iso_weq F)
       ∘ disp_cat_eq (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁)
       ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_disp_setgrpd D₁ D₁
           (isaprop_is_disp_setgrpd (pr1 D₁)))%weq
        (idpath D₁)) =
pr11 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
isPredicate disp_functor_axioms

      
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
x: disp_functor_data (identity_z_iso G) D₁ D₁
isaprop (disp_functor_axioms x)

      apply isaprop_disp_functor_axioms.
    
G: setgroupoid
D₁: disp_setgrpd G
pr11 ((weqfibtototal
         (λ x : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
                  (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
          (∏ x0 : G, isweq (x x0)) × disp_functor_ff x)
         (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso G))
         (λ F : disp_functor (functor_identity G)
                  (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁),
          disp_setgrpd_iso_weq F)
       ∘ disp_cat_eq (pr1 D₁) (pr1 D₁)
       ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_disp_setgrpd D₁ D₁
           (isaprop_is_disp_setgrpd (pr1 D₁)))%weq
        (idpath D₁)) =
pr11 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    apply idpath.
Qed.

 exact disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd.

(** * 7. The displayed category of isofibrations *)

disp_cat_ob_mor
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)


disp_cat_ob_mor
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)

  
total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd → UU
(λ obd : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd → UU,
 ∏ x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd,
 obd x
 → obd y
   → total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
     → UU) ?pr1

  
total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd → UU
 exact (λ GD, cleaving (pr12 GD)).
  
(λ obd : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd → UU,
 ∏ x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd,
 obd x
 → obd y
   → total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
     → UU)
  (λ GD : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd,
   cleaving (pr12 GD))
 exact (λ GD₁ GD₂ I₁ I₂ FF, preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (pr2 FF)).
Defined.


disp_cat_id_comp
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
  disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd


disp_cat_id_comp
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
  disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd

  
∏ (x : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
∏ (x y z : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

  
∏ (x : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 
G: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
I: disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd G
I -->[ identity G] I

    apply identity_preserves_cleaving.
  
∏ (x y z : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
G₁, G₂, G₃: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
F₁: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ G₁, G₂
⟧
F₂: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ G₂, G₃
⟧
I₁: disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd G₁
I₂: disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd G₂
I₃: disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd G₃
HF₁: I₁ -->[ F₁] I₂
HF₂: I₂ -->[ F₂] I₃
I₁ -->[ F₁ · F₂] I₃

    exact (composition_preserves_cleaving HF₁ HF₂).
Qed.


disp_cat_data
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)


disp_cat_data
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)

  
disp_cat_ob_mor
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
disp_cat_id_comp
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd) ?pr1

  
disp_cat_ob_mor
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
 exact disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd.
  
disp_cat_id_comp
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
  disp_cat_ob_mor_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd
 exact disp_cat_id_comp_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd.
Defined.


disp_cat_axioms
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
  disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd


disp_cat_axioms
  (total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
  disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd

  
∏ (x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
∏ (x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
∏ (x y z w : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(zz : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd z)
(ww : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
∏ (x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

  
∏ (x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff

    
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
∏ x : pr1 y, isaset ((pr12 y) x)

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
∏ (x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
 
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

    
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: pr1 disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
∏ x : pr1 y, isaset ((pr12 y) x)

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
∏ (x y z w : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y)
(zz : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd z)
(ww : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
 
x, y, z, w: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
zz: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd z
ww: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd w
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp

    
x, y, z, w: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
zz: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd z
ww: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd w
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
∏ x : pr1 w, isaset ((pr12 w) x)

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
∏ (x y : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd)
(f : total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
 
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
isaprop (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
f: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd x
yy: disp_cat_data_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd y
∏ x : pr1 y, isaset ((pr12 y) x)

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
Qed.

G: total_category disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
I₁, I₂: disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd G
isweq (λ e : I₁ = I₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
G: cat_of_setgroupoid
D: disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd (G,, D)
isweq (λ e : I₁ = I₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
isweq (λ e : I₁ = I₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) I₁ I₂ → I₁ = I₂
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
isaprop (I₁ = I₂)
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
isaprop (z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) I₁ I₂)

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) I₁ I₂ → I₁ = I₂
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
FF: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) I₁ I₂
I₁ = I₂
