D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
I₁ = I₂

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y: pr1 (G,, D)
I₁ y = I₂ y

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
I₁ y x = I₂ y x

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
I₁ y x f = I₂ y x f

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
I₁ y x f yy = I₂ y x f yy

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
pr1 (I₁ y x f yy) = pr1 (I₂ y x f yy)
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf
  (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x,
   ∑ ff : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff) ?p
  (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy)) = pr2 (I₂ y x f yy)

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
pr1 (I₁ y x f yy) = pr1 (I₂ y x f yy)
 exact (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy).
    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf
  (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x,
   ∑ ff : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
  (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy)) =
pr2 (I₂ y x f yy)
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x,
      ∑ ff : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
     (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy))) = pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf is_cartesian ?p
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x,
         ∑ ff : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
        (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
        (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy)))) = pr22 (I₂ y x f yy)

      
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x,
      ∑ ff : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
     (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy))) = pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x, x0 -->[ f] yy)
  (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₁ y x f yy)) = pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
pr12 (I₁ y x f yy) =
transportb (λ z : pr1 (pr12 (G,, D)) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy))

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
pr12 (I₁ y x f yy) = ?b
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
?b =
transportb (λ z : pr1 (pr12 (G,, D)) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy))

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
pr12 (I₁ y x f yy) = ?b

          exact (preserves_cleaving_mor_alt HFF f yy).
        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D x (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy))
     (disp_functor_identity D y yy))
  (id_left (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity (pr1 G) x))
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂
                                           ((# (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))%cat
                                              f)
                                           (disp_functor_identity
                                              D y yy))%mor_disp =
transportb (λ z : pr1 (pr12 (G,, D)) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy))

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_identity D x (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy))
     (disp_functor_identity D y yy))
  (id_left (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity (pr1 G) x))
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂
                                           ((# (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)))%cat
                                              f)
                                           (disp_functor_identity
                                              D y yy))%mor_disp =
transportf (λ z : pr1 (pr12 (G,, D)) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy))

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂ f yy)%mor_disp =
transportf (λ z : pr1 (pr1 D) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy))

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (λ z : pr1 (pr1 D) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂ f yy)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (λ z : pr1 (pr1 D) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)) = ?b
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂ f yy)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (λ z : pr1 (pr1 D) x, z -->[ f] yy)
  (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
  (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)) = ?b

          apply transportf_precompose_disp.
        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (I₁ y x f yy)) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)) ;; pr12 
   (I₂ y x f yy))%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂ f yy)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (I₁ y x f yy)) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)) ;; pr12 
   (I₂ y x f yy))%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂ f yy)%mor_disp

        
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (I₁ y x f yy)) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; pr12 (I₂ y x
                                                 f yy))%mor_disp =
transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
  (id_left f)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           I₂ f yy)%mor_disp

        apply idpath.
      
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
HFF: preserves_cleaving I₁ I₂ (disp_functor_identity D)
y, x: pr1 (G,, D)
f: pr1 (G,, D) ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: (pr12 (G,, D)) y
transportf is_cartesian
  (internal_paths_rew_r (pr1 (I₂ y x f yy) -->[ f] yy)
     (pr1
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x,
            ∑ b : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian b)
           (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
           (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy))))
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x, x0 -->[ f] yy)
        (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
        (pr12 (I₁ y x f yy)))
     (λ m : pr1 (I₂ y x f yy) -->[ f] yy,
      m = pr12 (I₂ y x f yy))
     (transportf_transpose_left
        (preserves_cleaving_mor_alt HFF f yy @
         ((! (transportf_precompose_disp f
                (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
                (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)) @
              internal_paths_rew_r
                (pr1 (I₁ y x f yy) -->[
                 z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
                   (idtoiso (idpath x))] pr1
                                           (I₂ y x f
                                              yy))
                (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
                   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                      (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f
                           yy)))
                (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                   (! (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f
                           yy)))
                (λ m : pr1 (I₁ y x f yy) -->[
                       z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
                         (idtoiso (idpath x))] pr1
                                                 (I₂ y
                                                 x f
                                                 yy),
                 transportf
                   (mor_disp (pr1 (I₁ y x f yy)) yy)
                   (id_left f)
                   (m ;; pr12 (I₂ y x f yy))%mor_disp =
                 transportf
                   (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
                   (id_left f)
                   (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                      (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; 
                    cleaving_mor I₂ f yy)%mor_disp)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (pr1 (I₁ y x f yy) =
                    pr1 (I₂ y x f yy))
                   (! (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f
                           yy))
                   (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
                   (λ p : pr1 (I₁ y x f yy) =
                          pr1 (I₂ y x f yy),
                    transportf
                      (mor_disp (pr1 (I₁ y x f yy)) yy)
                      (id_left f)
                      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) p ;; pr12 
                       (I₂ y x f yy))%mor_disp =
                    transportf
                      (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy)
                         yy) (id_left f)
                      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                         (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f
                            yy) ;; cleaving_mor I₂ f
                                     yy)%mor_disp)
                   (idpath
                      (transportf
                         (mor_disp
                            (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy) yy)
                         (id_left f)
                         (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
                            (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF
                               f yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                          I₂ f yy)%mor_disp))
                   (pathsinv0inv0
                      (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)))
                (idtoiso_disp_inv
                   (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)))
           :
           transportf
             (mor_disp
                (disp_functor_identity D x
                   (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy))
                (disp_functor_identity D y yy))
             (id_left (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f))
             (idtoiso_disp
                (idpath (functor_identity (pr1 G) x))
                (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; 
              cleaving_mor I₂
                ((# (functor_identity (pr1 G)))%cat f)
                (disp_functor_identity D y yy))%mor_disp =
           transportf
             (λ z : pr1 (pr12 (G,, D)) x, z -->[ f] yy)
             (! preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
             (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)))
          :
          transportf
            (mor_disp
               (disp_functor_identity D x
                  (cleaving_ob I₁ f yy))
               (disp_functor_identity D y yy))
            (id_left (# (functor_identity (pr1 G)) f))
            (idtoiso_disp
               (idpath (functor_identity (pr1 G) x))
               (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy) ;; 
             cleaving_mor I₂
               ((# (functor_identity (pr1 G)))%cat f)
               (disp_functor_identity D y yy))%mor_disp =
          transportb
            (λ z : pr1 (pr12 (G,, D)) x, z -->[ f] yy)
            (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
            (pr12 (I₂ y x f yy)))))
     (pr1_transportf (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
        (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy))))
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ x0 : (pr12 (G,, D)) x,
         ∑ ff : x0 -->[ f] yy, is_cartesian ff)
        (preserves_cleaving_ob HFF f yy)
        (pr2 (I₁ y x f yy)))) = pr22 (I₂ y x f yy)
 apply isaprop_is_cartesian.
  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
isaprop (I₁ = I₂)
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
∏ x : pr1 (G,, D), isaset ((pr12 (G,, D)) x)

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
x: pr1 (G,, D)
isaset ((pr12 (G,, D)) x)

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
isaprop (z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) I₁ I₂)
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)))
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
∏ x y : I₁ -->[ identity_z_iso (G,, D)] I₂,
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) x
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) y → x = y

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)))
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
x: I₁ -->[ identity_z_iso (G,, D)] I₂
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) x)

      apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
∏ x y : I₁ -->[ identity_z_iso (G,, D)] I₂,
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) x
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) y → x = y
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
x, y: I₁ -->[ identity_z_iso (G,, D)] I₂
X: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) x
X0: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) y
x = y

      
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
x, y: I₁ -->[ identity_z_iso (G,, D)] I₂
X: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) x
X0: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) y
∏ x : pr1 (G,, D), isaset ((pr12 (G,, D)) x)

      
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I₁, I₂: cleaving (pr1 D)
x, y: I₁ -->[ identity_z_iso (G,, D)] I₂
X: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) x
X0: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (G,, D)) y
x0: pr1 (G,, D)
isaset ((pr12 (G,, D)) x0)

      apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
Qed.

Definition disp_cat_isofib
  : disp_cat cat_of_setgroupoid
  := sigma_disp_cat disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd.


is_univalent_disp disp_cat_isofib


is_univalent_disp disp_cat_isofib

  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd

  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd
 exact is_univalent_disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd.
  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd
 exact is_univalent_disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd.
Qed.


disp_univalent_category univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid


disp_univalent_category univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid

  
disp_cat univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid
is_univalent_disp ?D

  
disp_cat univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid
 exact disp_cat_isofib.
  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_isofib
 exact is_univalent_disp_cat_isofib.
Defined.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
FF = FF'


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
FF = FF'

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂,
   pr2 D₁ -->[ F,, x] pr2 D₂)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
pr1 FF = pr1 FF'

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂,
   pr2 D₁ -->[ F,, x] pr2 D₂)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
x: pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂
isaprop (pr2 D₁ -->[ F,, x] pr2 D₂)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
x: pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂
∏ x : pr1 G₂, isaset ((pr11 D₂) x)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
x: pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂
x0: pr1 G₂
isaset ((pr11 D₂) x0)

    apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr1 FF = pr1 FF'
pr1 FF = pr1 FF'

  exact p.
Qed.

(** * 8. A cleaving for the displayed category of isofibrations *)
Section Cleaving.
  Context {G₁ G₂ : setgroupoid}
          (F : G₂ ⟶ G₁)
          (D : disp_setgrpd G₁)
          (I : cleaving D).

  Let DD : disp_cat_isofib G₁ := D ,, I.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_setgrpd G₂

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_setgrpd G₂

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat G₂
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
∏ x : G₂, isaset (?pr1 x)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ _ : ∏ x : G₂, isaset (?pr1 x),
 groupoidal_disp_cat ?pr1) ?pr10

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat G₂
 exact (reindex_disp_cat F D).
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
∏ x : G₂, isaset (reindex_disp_cat F D x)
 abstract
        (intros x ; cbn ;
         apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd).
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ _ : ∏ x : G₂, isaset (reindex_disp_cat F D x),
 groupoidal_disp_cat (reindex_disp_cat F D))
  disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd_subproof
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
groupoidal_disp_cat (reindex_disp_cat_data F D)

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
x, y: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: reindex_disp_cat_data F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat_data F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
x, y: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: reindex_disp_cat_data F D x
yy: reindex_disp_cat_data F D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (# F f)
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F Hf)) ff

      apply is_z_iso_disp_set_grpd.
  Defined.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib G₂

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib G₂

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ d : disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd G₂,
 disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd (G₂,, d)) ?pr1

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd G₂
 exact disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd.
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ d : disp_cat_of_disp_setgrpd G₂,
 disp_cat_isofib_over_disp_setgrpd (G₂,, d))
  disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
cleaving D

      exact I.
  Defined.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F] DD

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F] DD

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ fD : pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD,
 pr2 disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F,, fD] pr2 DD) ?pr1

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD
 apply reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor.
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ fD : pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD,
 pr2 disp_cat_isofib_subst -->[ F,, fD] pr2 DD)
  (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F (pr1 DD))
 apply preserves_cleaving_reindex.
  Defined.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
is_cartesian disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
is_cartesian disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
∃! gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
(gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
(gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ cntr : ∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
          (gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp =
          FF,
 ∏
 t : ∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
     (gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
(gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
pr1 D' -->[ F'] pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ fD : pr1 D' -->[ F'] pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst,
 pr2 D' -->[ F',, fD] pr2 disp_cat_isofib_subst) ?pr1
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
 (gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF)
  (?pr1,, ?pr20)

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
pr1 D' -->[ F'] pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr1 FF)).
      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ fD : pr1 D' -->[ F'] pr1 disp_cat_isofib_subst,
 pr2 D' -->[ F',, fD] pr2 disp_cat_isofib_subst)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr1 FF))
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
preserves_cleaving (pr2 D') I (pr1 FF)

        exact (pr2 FF).
      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
 (gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr1 FF),,
   preserves_cleaving_lift_reindex (pr1 FF) (pr2 FF))
 abstract
          (use mor_eq_disp_cat_isofib ;
           use disp_functor_eq ;
           apply idpath).
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
DD:= D,, I: disp_cat_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ cntr : ∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
          (gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp =
          FF,
 ∏
 t : ∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_isofib_subst,
     (gg ;; disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF,
 t = cntr)
  ((lift_functor_into_reindex (pr1 FF),,
    preserves_cleaving_lift_reindex (pr1 FF) (pr2 FF)),,
   is_cartesian_disp_cat_isofib_subst_subproof G₃ F'
     D' FF)
 abstract
        (intros H ;
         induction H as [ H HH ] ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply homsets_disp | ] ;
         use mor_eq_disp_cat_isofib ;
         use disp_functor_eq ;
         cbn ; cbn in HH ;
         exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) HH)).
  Defined.
End Cleaving.


cleaving disp_cat_isofib


cleaving disp_cat_isofib

  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_isofib G₁
cartesian_lift D F

  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib G₂
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_isofib G₁
?pr1 -->[ F] D
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ ff : ?pr1 -->[ F] D, is_cartesian ff) ?pr10

  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib G₂
 exact (disp_cat_isofib_subst F (pr1 D) (pr2 D)).
  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib_subst F (pr1 D) (pr2 D) -->[ F] D
 exact (disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor F (pr1 D) (pr2 D)).
  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_isofib G₁
(λ ff : disp_cat_isofib_subst F (pr1 D) (pr2 D) -->[
        F] D, is_cartesian ff)
  (disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor F (pr1 D) (pr2 D))
 exact (is_cartesian_disp_cat_isofib_subst F (pr1 D) (pr2 D)).
Defined.

(** * 9. The displayed category of split isofibrations *)
Definition is_split_isofibration
           {G : setgroupoid}
           {D : disp_setgrpd G}
           (I : cleaving D)
  : UU
  := is_split_id I × is_split_comp I.


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx = xx


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx = xx

  exact (pr1 (pr1 H x xx)).
Defined.


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
cleaving_mor I (identity x) xx =
transportb (λ zz : pr1 D x, zz -->[ identity x] xx)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) (id_disp xx)


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
cleaving_mor I (identity x) xx =
transportb (λ zz : pr1 D x, zz -->[ identity x] xx)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) (id_disp xx)

  exact (pr2 (pr1 H x xx)).
Defined.


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
cleaving_mor I (identity x) xx =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
cleaving_mor I (identity x) xx =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportb (λ zz : pr1 D x, zz -->[ identity x] xx)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) (id_disp xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportb (λ zz : pr1 D x, zz -->[ identity x] xx)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) (id_disp xx) =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportb (λ zz : pr1 D x, zz -->[ identity x] xx)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) (id_disp xx) =
?b

    apply transportf_precompose_disp.
  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)) ;; 
   id_disp xx)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! (! split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)) ;; 
   id_disp xx)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) ;; id_disp
                                                 xx)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
     (id_right
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath x))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
     (! id_right
          (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath x))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x: G
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx) xx)
  (! id_right
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath x))) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)) =
transportf
  (λ z : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (identity x) xx -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_right (identity x) @ id_left (identity x))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
cleaving_ob I (g · f) zz =
cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz)


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
cleaving_ob I (g · f) zz =
cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz)

  exact (pr1 (pr2 H z y x f g zz)).
Defined.


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz =
transportb (λ xx : pr1 D x, xx -->[ g · f] zz)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz)
  (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz =
transportb (λ xx : pr1 D x, xx -->[ g · f] zz)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz)
  (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp

  exact (pr2 (pr2 H z y x f g zz)).
Defined.


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz)%mor_disp


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz)%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz)%mor_disp = ?b
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
?b =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz)%mor_disp = ?b

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
cleaving_mor I (g · f) zz = ?t2

    exact (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_mor_path H f g zz).
  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   transportb (λ xx : pr1 D x, xx -->[ g · f] zz)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz)
     (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I f
                                                 zz))%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   transportb (λ xx : pr1 D x, xx -->[ g · f] zz)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz)
     (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I f
                                                 zz))%mor_disp =
?b
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
?b =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   transportb (λ xx : pr1 D x, xx -->[ g · f] zz)
     (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz)
     (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I f
                                                 zz))%mor_disp =
?b

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportb (λ xx : pr1 D x, xx -->[ g · f] zz)
  (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz)
  (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp =
?t2

    apply transportf_precompose_disp.
  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (g · f) zz) zz)
     (id_left (g · f))
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
           (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g
                zz)) ;; (cleaving_mor I g
                           (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; 
                         cleaving_mor I f zz)))%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (id_left (g · f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz))
        zz)
     (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x)))
        (id_left (g · f)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
      (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
         (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
            (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f
                 g zz)) ;; (cleaving_mor I g
                              (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; 
                            cleaving_mor I f zz)))%mor_disp) =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (id_left (g · f)) @ id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
      (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
         (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g
              zz)) ;; (cleaving_mor I g
                         (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I f
                                                 zz)))%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x)) (identity x) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (id_left (g · f)) @ id_left (g · f))
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[
      z0] cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz))
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz @
         split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz)) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x)) (identity x) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (id_left (g · f)) @ id_left (g · f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz))
        zz)
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · g)
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · g) f
        (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
           (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) g
           (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz @
         split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;;

G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · g)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · g) f
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) g
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x)) (identity x) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (id_left (g · f)) @ id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H f g zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

D: disp_setgrpd G

H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x) · g)
     (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x · g) f
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath x))
        (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) g
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))) @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x) · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath x)) (identity x) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath x)))
     (id_left (g · f)) @ id_left (g · f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (idpath (cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz))) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · g)
     (identity x · identity x · g) f
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) g
        (! id_left (identity x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) (id_left (g · f)) @
   id_left (g · f))
  (id_disp (cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz)) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid

H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · g)
     (identity x · identity x · g) f
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) g
        (! id_left (identity x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) (id_left (g · f)) @
   id_left (g · f))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz))
        (cleaving_ob I f zz)) (id_left g)
     (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz)) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I f
                                                 zz)%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · g)
     (identity x · identity x · g) f

        (identity x · identity x) g
        (! id_left (identity x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (g · f) @
