   id_left (g · f))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz))
        zz)
     (cancel_postcomposition g (identity x · g) f
        (! id_left g))
     (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I f
                                                 zz)%mor_disp) =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) -->[ z0] zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition g (identity x · g) f
     (! id_left g) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · g)
     (identity x · identity x · g) f
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (identity x · identity x) g
        (! id_left (identity x))) @
   ! assoc (identity x · identity x) g f @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x)) (id_left (g · f)) @
   id_left (g · f))
  (cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                              I f zz)%mor_disp =
(cleaving_mor I g (cleaving_ob I f zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                            I f zz)%mor_disp

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
x, y, z: G
f: G ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: D z
isaset (pr1 G ⟦ x, z ⟧)

  apply (homset_property G).
Qed.


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
isaprop (is_split_isofibration I)


G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
isaprop (is_split_isofibration I)

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
isaprop (is_split_id I)
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
isaprop (is_split_comp I)

  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
isaprop (is_split_id I)
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t: G
t0: D t
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t0 : D t,
    ∑ e : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
    cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
    transportb (λ x : pr1 D t, x -->[ identity t] t0)
      e (id_disp t0)) t0)

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t: G
t0: D t
isPredicate
  (λ x : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
   cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
   transportb (λ x0 : pr1 D t, x0 -->[ identity t] t0)
     x (id_disp t0))
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t: G
t0: D t
∏ x y : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
(λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
 cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
 transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t, x1 -->[ identity t] t0)
   x0 (id_disp t0)) x
→ (λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
   cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
   transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t, x1 -->[ identity t] t0)
     x0 (id_disp t0)) y → x = y

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t: G
t0: D t
isPredicate
  (λ x : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
   cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
   transportb (λ x0 : pr1 D t, x0 -->[ identity t] t0)
     x (id_disp t0))
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t: G
t0: D t
x: cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0
isaprop
  (cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
   transportb (λ x : pr1 D t, x -->[ identity t] t0) x
     (id_disp t0))

      apply homsets_disp.
    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t: G
t0: D t
∏ x y : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
(λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
 cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
 transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t, x1 -->[ identity t] t0)
   x0 (id_disp t0)) x
→ (λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
   cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
   transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t, x1 -->[ identity t] t0)
     x0 (id_disp t0)) y → x = y
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t: G
t0: D t
x, y: cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0
X: (λ x : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
 cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
 transportb
   (λ x0 : pr1 D t, x0 -->[ identity t] t0) x
   (id_disp t0)) x
X0: (λ x : cleaving_ob I (identity t) t0 = t0,
 cleaving_mor I (identity t) t0 =
 transportb
   (λ x0 : pr1 D t, x0 -->[ identity t] t0) x
   (id_disp t0)) y
x = y

      apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
  
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
isaprop (is_split_comp I)
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t, t0, t1: G
t2: G ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t3: G ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: D t
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t4 : D t,
    ∑
    e : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
        cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
    cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
    transportb (λ x : pr1 D t1, x -->[ t3 · t2] t4) e
      (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; 
       cleaving_mor I t2 t4)%mor_disp) t4)

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t, t0, t1: G
t2: G ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t3: G ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: D t
isPredicate
  (λ x : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
         cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
   cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
   transportb (λ x0 : pr1 D t1, x0 -->[ t3 · t2] t4) x
     (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t, t0, t1: G
t2: G ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t3: G ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: D t
∏
x
 y : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
     cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
(λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
        cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
 cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
 transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t1, x1 -->[ t3 · t2] t4) x0
   (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
  x
→ (λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
          cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
   cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
   transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t1, x1 -->[ t3 · t2] t4)
     x0
     (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
    y → x = y

    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t, t0, t1: G
t2: G ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t3: G ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: D t
isPredicate
  (λ x : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
         cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
   cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
   transportb (λ x0 : pr1 D t1, x0 -->[ t3 · t2] t4) x
     (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t, t0, t1: G
t2: G ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t3: G ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: D t
x: cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4)
isaprop
  (cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
   transportb (λ x : pr1 D t1, x -->[ t3 · t2] t4) x
     (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)

      apply homsets_disp.
    
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t, t0, t1: G
t2: G ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t3: G ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: D t
∏
x
 y : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
     cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
(λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
        cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
 cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
 transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t1, x1 -->[ t3 · t2] t4) x0
   (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
  x
→ (λ x0 : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
          cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
   cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
   transportb (λ x1 : pr1 D t1, x1 -->[ t3 · t2] t4)
     x0
     (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
    y → x = y
 
G: setgroupoid
D: disp_setgrpd G
I: cleaving D
t, t0, t1: G
t2: G ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t3: G ⟦ t1, t0 ⟧
t4: D t
x, y: cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4)
X: (λ x : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
       cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
 cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
 transportb (λ x0 : pr1 D t1, x0 -->[ t3 · t2] t4)
   x
   (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I
                                                 t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
  x
X0: (λ x : cleaving_ob I (t3 · t2) t4 =
       cleaving_ob I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4),
 cleaving_mor I (t3 · t2) t4 =
 transportb
   (λ x0 : pr1 D t1, x0 -->[ t3 · t2] t4) x
   (cleaving_mor I t3 (cleaving_ob I t2 t4) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I
                                                 t2
                                                 t4)%mor_disp)
  y
x = y

      apply isaset_ob_disp_set_grpd.
Qed.

Definition disp_cat_split_isofib
  : disp_cat cat_of_setgroupoid
  := sigma_disp_cat
       (disp_full_sub
          (total_category disp_cat_isofib)
          (λ D, is_split_isofibration (pr22 D))).


is_univalent_disp disp_cat_split_isofib


is_univalent_disp disp_cat_split_isofib

  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_isofib
is_univalent_disp
  (disp_full_sub (total_category disp_cat_isofib)
     (λ D : total_category disp_cat_isofib,
      is_split_isofibration (pr22 D)))

  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_isofib
 exact is_univalent_disp_cat_isofib.
  
is_univalent_disp
  (disp_full_sub (total_category disp_cat_isofib)
     (λ D : total_category disp_cat_isofib,
      is_split_isofibration (pr22 D)))
 
∏ x : total_category disp_cat_isofib,
isaprop
  ((λ D : total_category disp_cat_isofib,
    is_split_isofibration (pr22 D)) x)

    
D: total_category disp_cat_isofib
isaprop
  ((λ D : total_category disp_cat_isofib,
    is_split_isofibration (pr22 D)) D)

    exact (isaprop_is_split_isofibration (pr22 D)).
Qed.


disp_univalent_category univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid


disp_univalent_category univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid

  
disp_cat univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid
is_univalent_disp ?D

  
disp_cat univalent_cat_of_setgroupoid
 exact disp_cat_split_isofib.
  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_split_isofib
 exact is_univalent_disp_cat_split_isofib.
Defined.


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
FF = FF'


G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
FF = FF'

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂,
   pr2 D₁ -->[ F,, x] pr2 D₂)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
pr1 FF = pr1 FF'

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂,
   pr2 D₁ -->[ F,, x] pr2 D₂)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
x: pr1 D₁ -->[ F] pr1 D₂
isaprop (pr2 D₁ -->[ F,, x] pr2 D₂)

    apply isapropunit.
  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
pr1 FF = pr1 FF'

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₁ ⟶ G₂
D₁: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
D₂: disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
FF, FF': D₁ -->[ F] D₂
p: pr11 FF = pr11 FF'
pr11 FF = pr11 FF'

  exact p.
Qed.

(** * 10. A cleaving for the displayed category of split isofibrations *)

C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
idtoiso (idpath x) · g = f


C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
idtoiso (idpath x) · g = f

  
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity x · f = f

  apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
yy: D y
cleaving_ob H f yy = cleaving_ob H g yy


C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
yy: D y
cleaving_ob H f yy = cleaving_ob H g yy

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
cleaving_ob H f yy = cleaving_ob H f yy

  apply idpath.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
yy: D y
cleaving_mor H f yy =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base p)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (cleaving_ob_eq H p yy) ;; 
   cleaving_mor H g yy)%mor_disp


C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
yy: D y
cleaving_mor H f yy =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base p)
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (cleaving_ob_eq H p yy) ;; 
   cleaving_mor H g yy)%mor_disp

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
cleaving_mor H f yy =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (idpath f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
     (cleaving_ob_eq H (idpath f) yy) ;; cleaving_mor
                                           H f yy)%mor_disp

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
cleaving_mor H f yy =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (idpath f))
  (id_disp (cleaving_ob H f yy) ;; cleaving_mor H f yy)%mor_disp

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
cleaving_mor H f yy =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (idpath f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (cleaving_ob H f yy) yy)
     (id_left f) (cleaving_mor H f yy))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
cleaving_mor H f yy =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (idpath f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (cleaving_ob H f yy) yy)
     (! id_left f) (cleaving_mor H f yy))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
cleaving_mor H f yy =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left f @ cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (idpath f))
  (cleaving_mor H f yy)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, cleaving_ob H f yy -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left f @ cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (idpath f))
  (cleaving_mor H f yy) = cleaving_mor H f yy

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
H: cleaving D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
isaset (C ⟦ x, y ⟧)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

Section Cleaving.
  Context {G₁ G₂ : setgroupoid}
          (F : G₂ ⟶ G₁)
          (D : disp_setgrpd G₁)
          (I : cleaving D)
          (H : is_split_isofibration I).

  Let DD : disp_cat_split_isofib G₁ := (D ,, I) ,, H.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_split_isofibration
  (pr2 (disp_cat_isofib_subst F D I))

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_split_isofibration
  (pr2 (disp_cat_isofib_subst F D I))

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_split_id (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_split_comp (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_split_id (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
∑
e : cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
      (identity x) xx = xx,
cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
  (identity x) xx =
transportb
  (λ x0 : pr1 (disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D) x,
   x0 -->[ identity x] xx) e (id_disp xx)

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
  (identity x) xx = xx
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
(λ e : cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
         (identity x) xx = xx,
 cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
   (identity x) xx =
 transportb
   (λ x0 : pr1 (disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D) x,
    x0 -->[ identity x] xx) e (id_disp xx)) ?pr1

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
  (identity x) xx = xx
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
  (identity x) xx = cleaving_ob I (identity (F x)) xx

        exact (!(cleaving_ob_eq I (!functor_id F x) xx)).
      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
(λ e : cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
         (identity x) xx = xx,
 cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
   (identity x) xx =
 transportb
   (λ x0 : pr1 (disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D) x,
    x0 -->[ identity x] xx) e (id_disp xx))
  (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
   split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx) =
transportb
  (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (identity x)] xx)
  (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
   split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx))

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportb
  (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (identity x)] xx)
  (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
   split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx)) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportb
  (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (identity x)] xx)
  (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
   split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx)) = ?b
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
?b = pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportb
  (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (identity x)] xx)
  (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
   split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx)) = ?b

          apply transportf_precompose_disp.
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
            split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))) ;; 
   transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! (! (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
            split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))) ;; 
   transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (functor_id F x)
     (id_disp xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) ;; transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 xx xx)
                                                 (functor_id
                                                 F x)
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) ;; transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 xx xx)
                                                 (! 
                                                 functor_id
                                                 F x)
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
              (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
        (! functor_id F x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
         split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) ;; 
      id_disp xx)%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) ;; id_disp
                                                 xx)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (id_right
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
         split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (! id_right
          (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
             (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
         split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (! id_right
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)) = ?b
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
?b = pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx)) = ?b

          
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
  (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
   split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) = ?t2

          exact (!(transportf_transpose_left (idtoiso_disp_comp _ _))).
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))%mor_disp =
?b
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
?b = pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
   idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
  (split_isofib_cleaving_id_ob_path H xx) = ?t2

          exact (!(transportb_transpose_left (split_isofib_cleaving_id_mor_path' H xx))).
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
   transportb
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity (F x)) xx) xx)
     (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
      id_left (identity (F x)))
     (cleaving_mor I (identity (F x)) xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (cleaving_ob I (identity (F x)) xx) xx)
     (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
         id_left (identity (F x))))
     (cleaving_mor I (identity (F x)) xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
        (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
            id_left (identity (F x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
      cleaving_mor I (identity (F x)) xx)%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

I: cleaving D

?b = pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
cleaving_mor I (identity (F x)) xx = ?t2

          exact (cleaving_mor_on_eq I (!functor_id F x) xx).
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
         id_left (identity (F x)))) @
   id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z : G₁ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      cleaving_ob I (identity (F x)) xx -->[ z] xx)
     (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (! functor_id F x))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
      cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat (identity x)) xx))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (assoc (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
        (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) (# F (identity x)))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
      idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;;

     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @

   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat (identity x)) xx)%mor_disp =

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (! assoc (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
       (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) (# F (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (! functor_id F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
         id_left (identity (F x)))) @
   id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @

     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
        (idtoiso (idpath (F x))
         · idtoiso (idpath (F x))) (# F (identity x))
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
         cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; 
      cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat (identity x)) xx)%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

F: G₂ ⟶ G₁

I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁

xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x

  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (idtoiso (idpath (F x)) · idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (# F (identity x))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
       (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) (# F (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (! functor_id F x)) @

   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx @
      cleaving_ob_eq I (! functor_id F x) xx) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 (identity
                                                 x))
                                                 xx)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (idtoiso (idpath (F x)) · idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (# F (identity x))
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
       (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) (# F (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (! functor_id F x)) @

     (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
         id_left (identity (F x)))) @
   id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (I (F x) (F x) ((# F)%cat (identity x)) xx))) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat (identity x)) xx)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (! id_left (identity (F x))) @
   ! assoc (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
       (# F (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (! functor_id F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
         id_left (identity (F x)))) @
   id_left (identity (F x)) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @

  (id_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) ((# F)%cat (identity x)) xx)) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat (identity x)) xx)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (! id_left (identity (F x))) @
   ! assoc (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
       (# F (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))

   id_left (identity (F x)) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (id_left (# F (identity x)))
     (cleaving_mor I (# F (identity x)) xx)) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (! id_left (identity (F x))) @
   ! assoc (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
       (# F (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (! functor_id F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
         id_left (identity (F x)))) @
   id_left (identity (F x)) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
     (! id_left (# F (identity x)))
     (cleaving_mor I (# F (identity x)) xx)) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)) xx)
  (! id_left (# F (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     (identity (F x) · identity (F x))
     (# F (identity x)) (! id_left (identity (F x))) @
   ! assoc (identity (F x)) (identity (F x))
       (# F (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (! functor_id F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! (! id_right (identity (F x)) @
         id_left (identity (F x)))) @
   id_left (identity (F x)) @
   ! id_right (identity (F x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F x)))
     (! functor_id F x) @ id_left (# F (identity x)))
  (cleaving_mor I (# F (identity x)) xx) =
pr12 (I (F x) (F x) (# F (identity x)) xx)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
x: G₂
xx: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D x
isaset (pr1 G₁ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧)

        apply (homset_property G₁).
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_split_comp (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
∑
e : cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
      (g · f) zz =
    cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
      (cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f
         zz),
cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) (g · f)
  zz =
transportb
  (λ x0 : pr1 (disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D) x,
   x0 -->[ g · f] zz) e
  (cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
     (cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f
        zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                 (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f
                 zz)%mor_disp

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) (g · f)
  zz =
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
  (cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f zz)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
(λ e : cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
         (g · f) zz =
       cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
         (cleaving_ob
            (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f zz),
 cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
   (g · f) zz =
 transportb
   (λ x0 : pr1 (disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D) x,
    x0 -->[ g · f] zz) e
   (cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
      (cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f
         zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                  (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f
                  zz)%mor_disp) ?pr1

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) (g · f)
  zz =
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
  (cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f zz)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) (g · f)
  zz = cleaving_ob I (# F g · # F f) zz

        exact (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz).
      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
(λ e : cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
         (g · f) zz =
       cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
         (cleaving_ob
            (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f zz),
 cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
   (g · f) zz =
 transportb
   (λ x0 : pr1 (disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D) x,
    x0 -->[ g · f] zz) e
   (cleaving_mor (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) g
      (cleaving_ob (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f
         zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                  (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) f
                  zz)%mor_disp)
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
   split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
     (# F g) zz)
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz) =
transportb (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (g · f)] zz)
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
   split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
     (# F g) zz)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (I (F y) (F x) (# F g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) (# F f) zz)))) zz)
     (functor_comp F g f)
     (pr12 (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))) ;; pr12 
      (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))%mor_disp)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportb (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (g · f)] zz)
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
   split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
     (# F g) zz)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (I (F y) (F x) (# F g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) (# F f) zz)))) zz)
     (functor_comp F g f)
     (pr12 (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))) ;; pr12 
      (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportb (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (g · f)] zz)
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
   split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
     (# F g) zz)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (I (F y) (F x) (# F g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) (# F f) zz)))) zz)
     (functor_comp F g f)
     (pr12 (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))) ;; pr12 
      (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))%mor_disp) = 
?b
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
?b = pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportb (λ x0 : D (F x), x0 -->[ # F (g · f)] zz)
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
   split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
     (# F g) zz)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (I (F y) (F x) (# F g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) (# F f) zz)))) zz)
     (functor_comp F g f)
     (pr12 (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))) ;; pr12 
      (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))%mor_disp) = 
?b

          apply transportf_precompose_disp.
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (! (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
            split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
              ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz))) ;; 
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))))
        zz) (functor_comp F g f)
     (pr12 (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))) ;; pr12 
      (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz)))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D

DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (! (! (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
            split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
              ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz))) ;; 
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1
           (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))))
        zz) (functor_comp F g f)
     (pr12 (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
              (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))) ;; pr12 
      (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz)))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; transportb
                                             (mor_disp
                                                (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F x)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))))
                                                zz)
                                             (functor_comp
                                                F g f)
                                             (pr12 
                                              (I (F y)
                                                 (F x)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))) ;; pr12 
                                              (I (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; transportf
                                             (mor_disp
                                                (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F x)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))))
                                                zz)
                                             (! functor_comp
                                                 F g f)
                                             (pr12 
                                              (I (F y)
                                                 (F x)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))) ;; pr12 
                                              (I (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz))
        zz)
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
              (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
        (! functor_comp F g f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
         split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
           ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; (pr12 
                                               (I
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F x)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))) ;; pr12 
                                               (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)))%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; (pr12 (I
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F x)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))) ;; pr12 
                                            (I (F z)
                                               (F y)
                                               ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; (pr12 (I

                                                 g)

                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))) ;; pr12

                                               (F y)
                                               ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)))%mor_disp =
?b
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
?b = pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; (pr12 (I
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F x)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (I
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))) ;; pr12 
                                            (I (F z)
                                               (F y)
                                               ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)))%mor_disp =
?b

          
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
(pr12 (I (F y) (F x) ((# F)%cat g)
         (pr1 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))) ;; pr12 
 (I (F z) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) zz))%mor_disp = ?t2

          apply (split_isofib_cleaving_comp_mor_path' H).
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; transportf
                                             (λ z0 : 
                                                 G₁
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 F z ⟧,
                                              cleaving_ob
                                                I
                                                ((# F)%cat
                                                 g)
                                                (cleaving_ob
                                                 I
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz) -->[
                                              z0] zz)
                                             (id_left
                                                ((# F)%cat
                                                 g
                                                 · 
                                                 (# F)%cat
                                                 f))
                                             (idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x))
                                                (! 
                                                 split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path
                                                 H
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g) zz) ;; 
                                              cleaving_mor
                                                I
                                                ((# F)%cat
                                                 g
                                                 · 
                                                 (# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz))%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (transportf

        zz)
     (maponpaths

           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso

                                               cleaving_mor
                                                 I
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g

                                                 f) zz))%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz))
        zz)
     (assoc
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
        (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
         split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
           ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x))
                                                (! 
                                                 split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path
                                                 H
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g) zz) ;; 
      cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
      split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                             (idpath

                                                 H

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁

DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
(idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
   (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
    split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H ((# F)%cat f)
      ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
                             (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path
                                  H ((# F)%cat f)
                                  ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; 
 cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧

(idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
   (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
    split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H ((# F)%cat f)
      ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
                             (! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path
                                  H ((# F)%cat f)
                                  ((# F)%cat g) zz))%mor_disp =
?y'

          apply idtoiso_disp_comp.
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : G₁ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      pr1 (I (F z) (F x) ((# F)%cat (g · f)) zz) -->[
      z0] cleaving_ob I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)
     (id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
          split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
            ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) @
         ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
             ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz)) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g
                                                 · 
                                                 (# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁

z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : G₁ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      pr1 (I (F z) (F x) ((# F)%cat (g · f)) zz) -->[
      z0] cleaving_ob I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
          split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
            ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) @
         ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
             ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz)) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g
                                                 · 
                                                 (# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz))
        zz)
     (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
         · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
        (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
        ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
          split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
            ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) @
         ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
             ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                                 I
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 g
                                                 · 
                                                 (# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)%mor_disp) =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
      · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
       split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
         ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) @
      ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
          ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                               I
                                               ((# F)%cat
                                                 g
                                                · 
                                                (# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
       split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
         ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) @
      ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
          ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                               I
                                               ((# F)%cat
                                                 g
                                                · 
                                                (# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)%mor_disp =
?b
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁

D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D

z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧

zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
      · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
       split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
         ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) @
      ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
          ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                               I

                                                 f) zz)%mor_disp =

G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
(idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
   ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
     split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
       ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) @
    ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H
        ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) zz) ;; cleaving_mor
                                             I
                                             ((# F)%cat
                                                g
                                              · (# F)%cat
                                                 f) zz)%mor_disp =
?t2

          
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
  ((cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
    split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
      (# F g) zz) @
   ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
       (# F g) zz) = ?y'

          
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁

z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
   split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
     (# F g) zz @
   ! split_isofib_cleaving_comp_ob_path H (# F f)
       (# F g) zz) = ?y'

z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz @
   idpath (cleaving_ob I (# F g · # F f) zz)) = ?y'
