zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
  (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz) = ?y'

          apply idpath.
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
      · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)%mor_disp =
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
      · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)%mor_disp

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁

H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz) = ?b
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
      · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)%mor_disp

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
pr12 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz) = ?b

          exact (cleaving_mor_on_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz).
        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
transportf
  (λ z0 : G₁ ⟦ F x, F z ⟧,
   cleaving_ob I (# F (g · f)) zz -->[ z0] zz)
  (cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (functor_comp F g f))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)%mor_disp =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (I (F z) (F x) (# F (g · f)) zz)) zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
      · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
     (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
   ! assoc
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
       (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
     (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (cleaving_ob_eq I (functor_comp F g f) zz) ;; 
   cleaving_mor I ((# F)%cat g · (# F)%cat f) zz)%mor_disp

        
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
z, y, x: G₂
f: G₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: G₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
zz: disp_cat_isofib_subst_setgrpd F D z
cleaving_mor_on_eq_base (functor_comp F g f) =
cancel_postcomposition (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
   · identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f)
  (! id_left (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))) @
! assoc
    (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x))))
    (identity (F x)) (# F g · # F f) @
maponpaths
  (compose
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
  (id_left (# F g · # F f)) @
maponpaths
  (compose
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))))
  (! functor_comp F g f) @ id_left (# F (g · f))

        apply (homset_property G₁).
  Qed.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_split_isofib G₂

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_split_isofib G₂

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib G₂
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
(λ d : disp_cat_isofib G₂,
 disp_full_sub (total_category disp_cat_isofib)
   (λ D : total_category disp_cat_isofib,
    is_split_isofibration (pr22 D)) (G₂,, d)) ?pr1

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_isofib G₂
 exact (disp_cat_isofib_subst F D I).
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
(λ d : disp_cat_isofib G₂,
 disp_full_sub (total_category disp_cat_isofib)
   (λ D : total_category disp_cat_isofib,
    is_split_isofibration (pr22 D)) (G₂,, d))
  (disp_cat_isofib_subst F D I)
 exact is_split_cleaving_reindex.
  Defined.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F] DD

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F] DD

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
pr1 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
(λ fD : pr1 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD,
 pr2 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F,, fD] pr2 DD)
  ?pr1

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
pr1 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD
 exact (disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor F D I).
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
(λ fD : pr1 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F] pr1 DD,
 pr2 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst -->[ F,, fD] pr2 DD)
  (disp_cat_isofib_subst_mor F D I)
 exact tt.
  Defined.

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_cartesian disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor

  
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
is_cartesian disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
∃! gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
(gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
(gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF

D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ cntr : ∑
          gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
          (gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp =
          FF,
 ∏
 t : ∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
     (gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp =
     FF, t = cntr) ?pr1

    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁

D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
(gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp = FF
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
disp_functor F' (pr11 D') (reindex_disp_cat F D)
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
preserves_cleaving (pr21 D')
  (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I) ?Goal
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(disp_functor_composite ?Goal
   (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D),,
 (?Goal0 ;; preserves_cleaving_reindex F D I)%mor_disp),,
tt = FF

      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
disp_functor F' (pr11 D') (reindex_disp_cat F D)
 exact (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr11 FF)).
      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
preserves_cleaving (pr21 D')
  (cleaving_reindex_disp_cat F D I)
  (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr11 FF))
 
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
preserves_cleaving (pr21 D') I (pr11 FF)

        exact (pr21 FF).
      
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(disp_functor_composite
   (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr11 FF))
   (reindex_disp_cat_disp_functor F D),,
 (preserves_cleaving_lift_reindex (pr11 FF) (pr21 FF) ;; 
  preserves_cleaving_reindex F D I)%mor_disp),, tt =
FF
 abstract
          (use (mor_eq_disp_cat_split_isofib (FF' := FF)) ;
           use disp_functor_eq ;
           apply idpath).
    
G₁, G₂: setgroupoid
F: G₂ ⟶ G₁
D: disp_setgrpd G₁
I: cleaving D
H: is_split_isofibration I
DD:= (D,, I),, H: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
G₃: cat_of_setgroupoid
F': cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₃, G₂ ⟧
D': disp_cat_split_isofib G₃
FF: D' -->[ F' · F] DD
(λ cntr : ∑
          gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
          (gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp =
          FF,
 ∏
 t : ∑ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
     (gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp =
     FF, t = cntr)
  ((((lift_functor_into_reindex (pr11 FF)
      :
      pr11 D' -->[
      F'] pr11 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst),,
     (preserves_cleaving_lift_reindex (pr11 FF)
        (pr21 FF)
      :
      (λ fD : pr11 D' -->[
              F'] pr11 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
       pr21 D' -->[
       F',, fD] pr21 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst)
        (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr11 FF)
         :
         pr11 D' -->[
         F'] pr11 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst))),, tt),,
   (is_cartesian_disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_subproof
      G₃ F' D' FF
    :
    (λ gg : D' -->[ F'] disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
     (gg ;; disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor)%mor_disp =
     FF)
      (((lift_functor_into_reindex (pr11 FF)
         :
         pr11 D' -->[
         F'] pr11 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst),,
        (preserves_cleaving_lift_reindex (pr11 FF)
           (pr21 FF)
         :
         (λ fD : pr11 D' -->[
                 F'] pr11 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst,
          pr21 D' -->[
          F',, fD] pr21 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst)
           (lift_functor_into_reindex (pr11 FF)
            :
            pr11 D' -->[
            F'] pr11 disp_cat_split_isofib_subst))),,
       tt)))
 abstract
        (intros K ;
         induction K as [ K KK ] ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply homsets_disp | ] ;
         use mor_eq_disp_cat_split_isofib ;
         use disp_functor_eq ;
         cbn ;
         exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr111 z) KK)).
  Defined.
End Cleaving.


cleaving disp_cat_split_isofib


cleaving disp_cat_split_isofib

  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
cartesian_lift D F

  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
?pr1 -->[ F] D
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
(λ ff : ?pr1 -->[ F] D, is_cartesian ff) ?pr10

  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_split_isofib G₂
 exact (disp_cat_split_isofib_subst F _ _ (pr2 D)).
  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
disp_cat_split_isofib_subst F
  (pr2 (pr1 (G₁,, pr1 D),, pr12 (G₁,, pr1 D)))
  (pr22 (G₁,, pr1 D)) (pr2 D) -->[ F] D
 exact (disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor F _ _ (pr2 D)).
  
G₁, G₂: cat_of_setgroupoid
F: cat_of_setgroupoid ⟦ G₂, G₁ ⟧
D: disp_cat_split_isofib G₁
(λ ff : disp_cat_split_isofib_subst F
          (pr2 (pr1 (G₁,, pr1 D),, pr12 (G₁,, pr1 D)))
          (pr22 (G₁,, pr1 D)) (pr2 D) -->[ F] D,
 is_cartesian ff)
  (disp_cat_split_isofib_subst_mor F
     (pr2 (pr1 (G₁,, pr1 D),, pr12 (G₁,, pr1 D)))
     (pr22 (G₁,, pr1 D)) (pr2 D))
 exact (is_cartesian_disp_cat_split_isofib_subst F _ _ (pr2 D)).
Defined.
